name: Raphael Warnock
subject: I'm asking you, here and now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miM_JJ6uA61gaM_sKscLy84q73ZIXjogTWL3w5ppOEH0Fzvd_QiOoOzUaBagxeYEwJYdv5eBIDyv2HFJaXk3ioRnOGzRRXsFV-fI-yat20Skd7W_Zov2xeKJrmymSemgRUT-7oqCjpVR1sjP6__xLO9YsS-P_O6aWwEFm1jOuEU5Rq5JPjXt853kXEVwgF10SsFsTz5y1t_Q11yeHWb1mMND6sVWXftoZDjHTuRxYuAiFdKUl3vTQdnwRoi9wzG7nRpvmcL2Ck6sFDm-1qQxUSbOqJdyeY7d6GipwnLe_gRpUaYhn7hJzCc_mZIPsZQh0j/3e5/1DlldAPQTritHU4MZpAh6w/h0/9s9m3HL9vDuHMy4n_VF7myYvhZ7AmDml-M6HHE52b8Y)
Derek -- my team just let me know that we're falling incredibly short. If you have a second, I'd like to tell you why it's so essential to our campaign – and our progressive future – that we reach our goals and raise what we need _right now_.

The truth is that the odds are against us. With the Senate split 50-50, the GOP needs to flip just one seat to retake control for Mitch McConnell, and _The New York Times_ reports that I'm one of the most vulnerable Senate Democrats in the entire country. Republicans are coming after me as their top target for defeat – and they've already started launching attack ads to try and crush our people-powered movement.

I won't let them – but I need your help. I've got this grassroots team – and right now, the only way I can fight back against these attacks and defend my seat is with your urgent support. That means hitting critical fundraising goals.

**So I'll be direct, Derek: I'm asking you to split a donation – here and now – between my campaign and Common Good VA. This will be one of the most competitive Senate races of the cycle, and we simply can't afford to fall behind before we even get started.**

**[Please, I need folks like you by my side: will you split a donation of $25 or more right now – as much as you can spare – to keep Georgia blue and defend our Senate majority?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miM_JJ6uA61gaM_sKscLy84i_npBBaqUHTp2x_bDf_R4SaOTz3-9N2UpgoMwPGePW7faKAHUwk__7waxX-0aMUPaGgbMylC1Tw7yfMfJICgo_AaKfgkcj7NNwCCYMYKLr7OIgIk-scm-QcgHt6qZ8YotNpsSPPRd5WYhWVJwVdzeDuLyyZgefw_HcLQ9DVDtL_tmdyEOwQEUqX1rrrE8Tw4wsw7SiwG9EDNHIFJCDXkf3SYP3e99ZJpf4N_aCP1JtC6jQjRTR3lqrVdV_9UUyePskByQmPoXhPy7Nx3xoduLlX6SBfpoFAsz4Q7l7JnF6s/3e5/1DlldAPQTritHU4MZpAh6w/h1/xRwlMOR_mUYtLkvAScwXof2u_IRA7dKWIj88aXytfhk)**[ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miM_JJ6uA61gaM_sKscLy84i_npBBaqUHTp2x_bDf_R4SaOTz3-9N2UpgoMwPGePW7IQfqgTwZUt1F881pvbRvq882LCjKjxp9k50R9crxtcjUEOA2qLt0S2rGRqp7qn5xta8rHW13yXquxCWBsdON6S2cYI7pUrqsRKnIBTAfmJjU8lMhKOFhkaeOIJqm0rgromXqwtzgSwASx5rw6izNz06a7DV6zc03lm4jIysFT6bGYEfm0xIjvxKDHDhYHKiucwQLrPzvlYt46Pmu91bi7yGO66sX8UTGDzrhWP4-hijYeQVY2Kisl3cmdtK4PQ-n/3e5/1DlldAPQTritHU4MZpAh6w/h2/zeBEqf5-hobm5bkWj20hQOberGMErzdTt0_rRrvrCY4) **[ Donate $25 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miM_JJ6uA61gaM_sKscLy84i_npBBaqUHTp2x_bDf_R4SaOTz3-9N2UpgoMwPGePW7KeSge6iUPKI1K6nOcoCR9SPBuTQwim2ZaC2FhAficlk1RFKBSCil81mtL4jyYWWUn8j4pqs44Oc8cUe_0J3i6DqZ-ohOEKc8rycPT1FBm_9fNBj08Etxhb0x8NB_gSVft28lYV0JrsI2hTeKj04POdxvHdc0pQVvAEEIkPAvyeLfmrosRfAb2HBNlw2JcEtMy02H-aTRSrmZ_JbYO0NyNEhRX0F8CGPgqukZu53701EEW5BUQ13_yGrckOoN-mvf/3e5/1DlldAPQTritHU4MZpAh6w/h3/FIx3wqBilGBl8RIAKx_d2oOMBn5j_DgRm-nF3u0dKOU)

name: Team AOC
subject: On the eviction moratorium:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Millions are depending on our action right now.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210802-2319-header&t=1&akid=2319%2E2526796%2ExXZ67N)
Over the last few days, a lot has happened regarding the federal eviction moratorium.
To catch you up and lay out what’s going on, we put together this email explaining everything you need to know and how you can help:
**What is the eviction moratorium?**
In September 2020, the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention issued a freeze on evictions to prevent homelessness during the pandemic and combat the spread of COVID-19.
The moratorium had been extended several times while state and local governments worked to distribute more than $45 billion in emergency funds that Congress appropriated to provide rental assistance for tenants and landlords.
The extended eviction ban was recently set to expire on June 30, but the Biden administration announced another extension through July 31 — a decision upheld by the Supreme Court.
**Why wasn’t it extended again?**
Last Thursday — the day before the House was set to adjourn — the Biden administration released a statement calling on Congress to extend the moratorium, suggesting that it only could be done through Congressional authorization this time.
But instead of staying to vote or reconvening to pass an extension in time, some members of Congress chose to leave for seven weeks of vacation, and Congress adjourned without taking action by the deadline.
**What is going on now?**
There’s still an opportunity to act, and we’re not accepting excuses. Up to 11 million people are currently behind on rent and are now at risk of being evicted — even though billions in emergency assistance for tenants and landlords is still available.
**Alexandria is joining Rep. Cori Bush and their colleagues in the House to urge Congress to do everything in its power to extend the moratorium. But they need your help to keep up the pressure:**
[Will you call your reps and urge them to take a stand and support extending the eviction moratorium? You can find the number and sample script here.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/call/em-eviction-moratorium/?source=em20210802-2319-P&t=2&akid=2319%2E2526796%2ExXZ67N)
**[Call your reps now](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/call/em-eviction-moratorium/?source=em20210802-2319-P&t=3&akid=2319%2E2526796%2ExXZ67N)**
Thank you for taking action today,
– Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210802?refcode=em20210802-2319-P&t=4&refcode2=2319_2526796_xXZ67N&akid=2319%2E2526796%2ExXZ67N)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20210802-2319-P&t=5&akid=2319%2E2526796%2ExXZ67N)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=6&akid=2319%2E2526796%2ExXZ67N) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=7&akid=2319%2E2526796%2ExXZ67N) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=8&akid=2319%2E2526796%2ExXZ67N)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=9&akid=2319%2E2526796%2ExXZ67N)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=2319%2E2526796%2ExXZ67N)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

There's no science to support the continued wearing of masks, either, especially for children! _But Biden and the radical left are trying to force new mask mandates._

It has NOTHING to do with science and EVERYTHING to do with control. That's exactly what I discussed with Tucker Carson recently. Did you watch?
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58061640:J3K4uxlNe:m:1:3253819041:D71E75AABBED543BB0E03267A191731A:r)
[**WATCH NOW >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58061640:J3K4uxlNe:m:1:3253819041:D71E75AABBED543BB0E03267A191731A:r)

After 18 months it seems clear to me that these bureaucrats including Dr. Fauci just cannot deal with having to give up the emergency powers the pandemic has given them.

But it's time to stand up and let them know we will not be embracing political theater anymore. We will TRUST THE SCIENCE and get the vaccine if we want to, burn the masks, and reject the vaccine passports plans outright.

name: Chief James Craig
subject: new Michigan poll
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chief James Craig for Governor Exploratory Committee • PO Box 15066 • Lansing, MI 48901 |
body:
**NEW POLL SHOWS CHIEF CRAIG IN A DEAD HEAT WITH GRETCHEN WHITMER** [**DONATE NOW
**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58061705:JcxTExlNg:m:1:3253819041:1159D9BB2920C64DDDD3E9822F9D0E40:r) | |
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58061705:JcxTExlNg:m:1:3253819041:1159D9BB2920C64DDDD3E9822F9D0E40:r)
|
---
Peter,

_**I 'm already TIED in the race with Gretchen Whitmer without a single campaign event, TV Ad, or even a formal announcement.**_

She's in trouble. And there's a good reason why.

More than half of Michiganders think the state is headed in the wrong direction, and 44% of them have a **very** unfavorable opinion of Governor Whitmer.

These numbers don't lie: **we have a unique opportunity to bring a change in leadership to Michigan.**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58061705:JcxTExlNg:m:1:3253819041:1159D9BB2920C64DDDD3E9822F9D0E40:r)

**So why are Michiganders asking me, a long-time police officer, to challenge the governor? **

Let me tell you my story, and perhaps you'll understand why.

My 40+ years serving as a police officer taught me a lot about leadership - and a lot about the importance of law and order.

See, I grew up right here in Detroit during the '67 riots, watching tanks rolling down these streets. I remember snipers on the roofs.

I was with the Los Angeles Police Department when the Rodney King riots happened.

The police retreated, and let their city burn.

**Since I've been Chief of Police in Detroit, the police have never retreated. We are here to protect our citizens.**

But there's more to the "why?" than that.

When I came home to run the Detroit Police Department, it was in shambles. Morale, equipment - it all needed help. The response time to 911 calls was an hour, if you were lucky.

I started with Colony Arms - the epicenter of crime in Detroit. I made it an example. We mounted an assault. Twenty to thirty arrests later, we cleaned it up. It showed that the police force was back in Detroit and that we never again would allow criminals to rule our city. That is leading from the front.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58061705:JcxTExlNg:m:1:3253819041:1159D9BB2920C64DDDD3E9822F9D0E40:r)

Then, I went into the city and met with every group I could find. Developed trust, showed what leadership could do.

So, when the unfortunate situation happened with George Floyd, and outsiders came here to try and burn us down, _**Detroit did not burn.**_

Leadership - real leadership - matters.

Living within the rules we set for others, instead of within some special rules for the elite.

No "rules for thee, not for me!"

Michigan has had enough of that. There are no kings and queens in America. Leading from the front. Why don't politicians get that?

Bringing our state back from the front. That's leadership.

I don't see much of that out there.

**So, I'm opening an exploratory committee to help me think about a run for Governor of Michigan. **

I believe in leading from the front - and I think you do too, Peter. That's why I'm inviting you to be a Lead From the Front donor. **[Contribute today and you will be a part of our team from Day 1.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58061705:JcxTExlNg:m:1:3253819041:1159D9BB2920C64DDDD3E9822F9D0E40:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58061705:JcxTExlNg:m:1:3253819041:1159D9BB2920C64DDDD3E9822F9D0E40:r)

[** LEAD FROM THE FRONT WITH CHIEF CRAIG**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58061705:JcxTExlNg:m:1:3253819041:1159D9BB2920C64DDDD3E9822F9D0E40:r)
Sometimes people are surprised to hear that I'm a Republican.

I grew up a Democrat. But then I watched as Democrats allowed our cities to riot, to burn, and to fail. I watched as they pushed handouts that increase dependency on the government for political gain.

**And what the Democratic Party stands for today - liberal wokeism and a perpetual victimhood mentality - those are NOT my values.**

_**And I'm pretty sure you can guess MY position on "Defund the Police!"**_

I grew up in the church. I was taught to respect my elders, the importance of self-reliance, and the value of hard work. I read the writings of great Americans like Abraham Lincoln, Frederick Douglass, Booker T. Washington and Sojourner Truth.

Looking back on it, my values were always Republican values.

When I was Chief of Police, I didn't broadcast my personal political affiliation. But the truth is, I've been a Republican for a long time.

**And I voted for President Trump in both elections - proudly.**

Michigan Republicans need a candidate that can bring our message into areas that aren't traditionally Republican voters.

And all of Michigan needs a governor that leads from the front, rather than ruling us like a queen.

**Lead from the front. Keep our people safe. Solve problems. That's what Michigan needs. Will you join me?**
**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**
[**JOIN CHIEF CRAIG NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58061705:JcxTExlNg:m:1:3253819041:1159D9BB2920C64DDDD3E9822F9D0E40:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58061706:JcxTExlNg:m:1:3253819041:1159D9BB2920C64DDDD3E9822F9D0E40:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58061707:JcxTExlNg:m:1:3253819041:1159D9BB2920C64DDDD3E9822F9D0E40:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58061708:JcxTExlNg:m:1:3253819041:1159D9BB2920C64DDDD3E9822F9D0E40:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58061709:JcxTExlNg:m:1:3253819041:1159D9BB2920C64DDDD3E9822F9D0E40:r)

Friend,
I had the great privilege of joining RNC Chairman Ronna McDaniel as a guest on an episode of her new podcast “Real America.” I am happy to share that TODAY, it is officially available on all major podcast platforms!

https://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ba1258b741546025cb386f1ad0a6b274357f6de783d92fac51bcebe75bd554e3136b59c71741ecc2e0648144408b7e484052a7c6e8fe7308
LISTEN NOW >>
I was excited to join Chairman McDaniel to discuss the real challenges and opportunities currently facing our great Nation. We, the Republican Party, are the Party that produces measurable progress in reasonable time for the American People. From school choice, to opportunity zones, economic mobility, and police reform the Republican Party delivers on promises made. I am proud to be a member of a Party that works to empower and improve the lives of ALL Americans.

But let’s be clear, while the Democrats spew their cynicism and divisive lies, we know the truth and will continue to hold them accountable for their hypocrisy. Contrary to what the Democrats would have you believe, we are a Nation of immense opportunity, and the Chairman and I touched on a few of those incredible opportunities in this episode.

https://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ba1258b741546025cb386f1ad0a6b274357f6de783d92fac51bcebe75bd554e3136b59c71741ecc2e0648144408b7e484052a7c6e8fe7308
Listen to Episode 5 of “Real America” NOW to hear the conversation between me and Chairman McDaniel. >>

https://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ba1258b741546025cb386f1ad0a6b274357f6de783d92fac51bcebe75bd554e3136b59c71741ecc2e0648144408b7e484052a7c6e8fe7308
LISTEN NOW >>
We are a nation that believes that all things for all people are possible, and that is a nation we can all be proud of. It’s up to Patriots like YOU, to ensure that this reality is preserved for future generations.

I sincerely hope that this conversation between me and Chairman McDaniel will inspire you to join the fight for the future of our great Nation.
Thank you,

| | Derek,

Virginia’s gubernatorial race is critical to the future of the Commonwealth and the future of the country. With the election just a few months away, we must all do our part to help my friend Terry win.

We see it across the country: Governors can stop attacks on our most fundamental rights as Americans. But right-wing governors take their states backward. With voting rights and reproductive freedom on the line for Virginians, we cannot take anything for granted. Poll after poll shows the race is essentially tied.

**The only way Terry can match his right-wing opponent’s resources is by building the largest grassroots donor team in Virginia history.**

****
Terry’s opponent isn’t just proud to have Donald Trump’s endorsement; he supported Donald Trump’s anti-democratic conspiracy theories about the 2020 election. He was even caught on tape saying that he would hide his extreme views on banning abortion and defunding Planned Parenthood from the voters of Virginia.

_Derek, here’s the deal: Terry must win._

Terry is a champion for reproductive rights and the freedom to vote. As governor, he restored voting rights to more people than any other governor in history. He fought hard to make sure Virginia was one of the most welcoming, inclusive, and forward-looking states in the country.

This is not just about electing Terry; it’s also about sending a message to the entire country that candidates who oppose reproductive rights and voting rights -- and who spread Donald Trump’s big lie -- will lose.

_**[Please, donate to Terry’s campaign right now and become a part of his historic movement.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33441958/298883339/-2023814932?refcode=20210803.1_SA_8F&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTYyYjMxYy01N2Y0LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HdxUiffaYSm4TTIDXoSkynt7ntLbTIzKGu5suj5JFjM=)**_

Friend,

Republicans across the state are hard at work to recruit paid poll workers to monitor our elections. Being a paid poll worker allows you to have a direct influence over how elections are run at the local level. If you are interested in becoming a paid poll worker or were looking for more information on what the role entails, visit our website here >> [**PAID POLL WORKER SIGNUP**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58553836:W3uSDZd5N:m:1:2068296031:E58E7560063CD2D62AAD22536345F068:r)

[**Conducting elections is not a spectator sport....we need YOU in the game, Friend! SIGN UP HERE!**
](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58553836:W3uSDZd5N:m:1:2068296031:E58E7560063CD2D62AAD22536345F068:r)
It was [**recently announced**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58553837:W3uSDZd5N:m:1:2068296031:E58E7560063CD2D62AAD22536345F068:r) that former Supreme Court Justice Michael Gableman will be expanding his investigatory efforts into the 2020 elections. Justice Gableman's investigation will focus on, but is not limited to, these areas:

* Facebook CEO Mark Zuckerberg's nonprofit organization's $8.8 million donation to five Wisconsin cities to administer the election

* Legal concerns about "guidance documents" issued by the Wisconsin Elections Commission to local clerks

* Deeper dive into Wisconsin's voting machines

[**While Justice Gableman and his team of investigators are hard at work, there is still a part for YOU to play in ensuring the integrity of our elections!**
](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58553836:W3uSDZd5N:m:1:2068296031:E58E7560063CD2D62AAD22536345F068:r)

-Team WisGOP

name: Erica Smith
subject: $5, $3, or even $1
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
More than 100 years later, I'm bringing the legacy of Princeville with me as I run to become the first Black woman to represent North Carolina in the U.S. Senate.
#
Here’s something you may not know about me.
In the North Carolina State Senate I represented Princeville, **the very first town incorporated by Black people in U.S. history.**
I’ll tell you more about Princeville, NC, but first I have to ask: [**_If you can, will you please make a donation to our historic Senate campaign? I’m running for the U.S. Senate to become North Carolina’s first Black senator — but I can’t do this alone and $5, $3, or even $1 makes a huge difference._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/7891?refcode=em20210803-307&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=307%2E3698%2EACkwmQ)
[**__**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/7891?refcode=em20210803-307&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=307%2E3698%2EACkwmQ)
**[Donate Now »](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/7891?refcode=em20210803-307&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=307%2E3698%2EACkwmQ)**
It was the honor of a lifetime to represent Princeville in the North Carolina State Senate for three terms. Generation after generation, the people of Princeville have developed a strong sense of pride in our history and in our community. **Today, Princeville stands as a symbol of Black determination and endurance.**
The town was incorporated in 1885, but its history as an independent Black community predates that. At the close of the Civil War, many former slaves settled in the swampy flood plain across the Tar River. The refugees called their new community Freedom Hill. Eventually, the name was changed to Princeville in honor of Turner Prince, an African-American man who helped build many of the community’s homes.
During Reconstruction, the community exercised its political strength by electing Black men to office. Princeville and Edgecombe County voters elected 11 Black men to the state legislature to serve 15 terms from 1877 to 1890.
But with the emergence of the white supremacist movement in North Carolina, Black voters and office holders were gradually excluded from the political process. Racist literacy tests and poll taxes excluded Black people from voting. Black voters were attacked or threatened by opposing whites, and their ballots were altered or discarded altogether.
**More than 100 years later, I'm bringing the legacy of Princeville with me as I run to become the first Black woman to represent North Carolina in the U.S. Senate. And with your help, I know we will indeed make history.**
Times are tough, and I know not everyone can give right now. [**_But if you can, will you please make a donation to our historic campaign to start our August fundraising off strong? $5, $3, or even $1 has a huge impact right now._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/7891?refcode=em20210803-307&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=307%2E3698%2EACkwmQ)
**[Donate Now »](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/7891?refcode=em20210803-307&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=307%2E3698%2EACkwmQ)**
Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
Erica ❤️
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210803-307-footer&t=6&refcode2=307_3698_ACkwmQ&akid=307%2E3698%2EACkwmQ)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=7&akid=307%2E3698%2EACkwmQ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=307%2E3698%2EACkwmQ)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

name: Heidi St. John
subject: Reminder: Have you voted in this year's primary?
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Washington State Closes the 2021 Primary on August 3rd
---
| Many people have asked, and I am running in next year's mid terms which will determine if we can keep/save our nation from the jaws of socialism, but this year's election (2021) is all about our local races: mayor, city and school board positions. It's these elected positions that have the most direct impact on our lives. On August 3rd, WA State closes the 2021 primary. The top winners in each race will advance to the general election in November.
We have many courageous candidates willing to represent our communities. Do you know who these people are on your ballot? Call them and ask questions. Their number is in the voter's pamphlet. Look up their website or Facebook page. Do your homework!
This past year we learned that elections really do have consequences. Do we want any more negative consequences?!
This year's election, called an odd-year election typically has the lowest voter turnout. The lowest! Yet it is this election that determines the leadership who will be deciding how much money you will be paying in local taxes, whether or not you have a police force, or if your child is taught critical race theory.
Our state legislature has made some pretty scary decisions of late that greatly affect the safety of our homes and our children.
When our state makes laws that infringe on our freedoms, harm our children, community or way of life we need to empower our city government to rise up and do the job the state is not doing. Our city and county councils can override this tyranny! They can protect our community.
As of today, with 5 days left to vote in this year's primary, only 13% of voters across our 3rd Congressional District have returned their ballots. In 2019 barely 30% of registered voters cast a ballot.
Friends!! We need to care about these elections!
If you haven't voted yet, find your ballot and cast your vote. Deadline is Tuesday, August 3rd.
Next year I am counting on you. Other great candidates are counting on you this year! I cannot do this without you.
---
|
---
| | |
---
| Election Transparency
---
| Do you know about the information that is available in an attempt to keep our elections transparent?
Your ballot status: [Vote.wa.gov](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rhJ6AzaT2dhiu70Baom_SYBQQM2xOaRB9c6plucQqFlceRu2f2WTVWSmLbhd265G8TvZlgc2l_YSh8NTz3fNAtPAaZTQbVqXfUvaMOfp-ZEF_mIOkX6RYQiRSDRtQLk3BjcGYYRMJNE=&c=EUDAD0jjZjt1jsKn-oOgBSRcAGzN1Y2_0seDENE3dtSSedtoGGPoHA==&ch=UXihsGN1lXL3x2Ns_He84TGxcAp5AMjucYxF0GmxzkmZ30LQA4gHLw==)
Statewide ballot returns data: [ballot-return-statistics.aspx](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rhJ6AzaT2dhiu70Baom_SYBQQM2xOaRB9c6plucQqFlceRu2f2WTVWSmLbhd265Gsdep7CTs1aVRTz2Ehsw9FfjMlsWzYN6094upK36GNVirfq0QQqIebsIn8d2wdd1orfsuQHi8kmX-1oeXH3RoV1F12UnN1gtHtyU_khKGAWFO8VLFYcAJgyULv-J2URRhrp8RlN-iVsZWgmAYAW54Sw==&c=EUDAD0jjZjt1jsKn-oOgBSRcAGzN1Y2_0seDENE3dtSSedtoGGPoHA==&ch=UXihsGN1lXL3x2Ns_He84TGxcAp5AMjucYxF0GmxzkmZ30LQA4gHLw==)
WA State Matchbacks shows every ballot that has been returned so far. [2021-primary-election.aspx](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rhJ6AzaT2dhiu70Baom_SYBQQM2xOaRB9c6plucQqFlceRu2f2WTVWSmLbhd265G9fVdQhLJRT2hTO0zdNPOaibYCe3eHPAONT9fUmG2z_JdiDpbvZ5ZxzwnKWgSDiLb7nnEMjbQHAZggOlthSJ_4CwqK16csiVSHx4Eg0ytSnnTRWP2-3_Q3PGPfeXxXpq2ZV7LJUVNstuY9T46I-cagA==&c=EUDAD0jjZjt1jsKn-oOgBSRcAGzN1Y2_0seDENE3dtSSedtoGGPoHA==&ch=UXihsGN1lXL3x2Ns_He84TGxcAp5AMjucYxF0GmxzkmZ30LQA4gHLw==)
---
| | |
---
| Make An Investment That Matters
Whether your investment is financial or one of time and energy (or both!) we want you to join our team of patriots. Host a fundraiser, sort t-shirts, work a fair booth, or help distribute signs. There are lots of ways to join the Heidi St. John for Congress team!
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | Washington State Closes the 2021 Primary on August 3rd | Many people have asked, and I am running in next year's mid terms which will determine if we can keep/save our nation from the jaws of socialism, but this year's election (2021) is all about our local races: mayor, city and school board positions. It's these elected positions that have the most direct impact on our lives. On August 3rd, WA State closes the 2021 primary. The top winners in each race will advance to the general election in November. We have many courageous candidates willing to represent our communities. Do you know who these people are on your ballot? Call them and ask questions. Their number is in the voter's pamphlet. Look up their website or Facebook page. Do your homework! This past year we learned that elections really do have consequences. Do we want any more negative consequences?! This year's election, called an odd-year election typically has the lowest voter turnout. The lowest! Yet it is this election that determines the leadership who will be deciding how much money you will be paying in local taxes, whether or not you have a police force, or if your child is taught critical race theory. Our state legislature has made some pretty scary decisions of late that greatly affect the safety of our homes and our children. When our state makes laws that infringe on our freedoms, harm our children, community or way of life we need to empower our city government to rise up and do the job the state is not doing. Our city and county councils can override this tyranny! They can protect our community. As of today, with 5 days left to vote in this year's primary, only 13% of voters across our 3rd Congressional District have returned their ballots. In 2019 barely 30% of registered voters cast a ballot. Friends!! We need to care about these elections! If you haven't voted yet, find your ballot and cast your vote. Deadline is Tuesday, August 3rd. Next year I am counting on you. Other great candidates are counting on you this year! I cannot do this without you. | | | | | Election Transparency | Do you know about the information that is available in an attempt to keep our elections transparent? Your ballot status: == Statewide ballot returns data: == WA State Matchbacks shows every ballot that has been returned so far. == | | | | Make An Investment That Matters Whether your investment is financial or one of time and energy (or both!) we want you to join our team of patriots. Host a fundraiser, sort t-shirts, work a fair booth, or help distribute signs. There are lots of ways to join the Heidi St. John for Congress team! | | | == | | | == | | | | == | America's Town Hall Last Friday, Sheriff's Deputy Jeremy Brown was killed while on duty in Vancouver, Washington. We must end the shameful narrative that the Democrats continue to use to erode public confidence in our LEO's. Also, I'll be addressing the question of Unions from a listener. | | == | | == | | | | | == | == == | | | | | Friends of Heidi St. John for Congress | PO Box 2828, Battle Ground, WA 98604 | | Sent by mailto:info@heidistjohnforcongress.com powered by

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: ARREST ANDREW CUOMO ➡️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elise for Congress
body:
ARREST ANDREW CUOMO
Andrew Cuomo needs to be arrested and prosecuted. The only way to get that done is if you join me, and we lay on the pressure.

Peter, what a pathetic disgrace Andrew Cuomo is to our state.

As a Congresswoman from New York, it's my job to protect and serve the incredible people I have in my district, no matter their age.

**Creepy Andrew Cuomo doesn 't agree, though.**

That's why, by his careless actions, thousands of our elderly New Yorkers **DIED** in Cuomo's corrupt nursing home scandal.

Cuomo won't take accountability for ANYTHING, including his own disgusting conduct.

_**NY Attorney General James, A DEMOCRAT, just announced Cuomo is GUILTY of harassing and assaulting women who worked for him. Yet, what are his repercussions? Cuomo gets to stay sitting in the Governor 's mansion continuing to reign terror down on New Yorkers?**_

No. This has to end NOW. Even if you are not a New Yorker, I hope you will join me in fighting to have this predator removed.

[**Peter, help me restore integrity in New York and sign our petition to REMOVE ANDREW CUOMO from office.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58064797:6cVRhxl0N:m:1:3253819041:1AB83A59AE16C25AF07AD84B6926755C:r)
**We can 't let Creepy, Corrupt Cuomo get away with sweeping his criminal behavior under the rug. I'm asking you to join my team to hold Cuomo accountable.**
| [HOLD CUOMO ACCOUNTABLE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58064797:6cVRhxl0N:m:1:3253819041:1AB83A59AE16C25AF07AD84B6926755C:r)
---

[JOIN MY FIGHT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58064797:6cVRhxl0N:m:1:3253819041:1AB83A59AE16C25AF07AD84B6926755C:r)
---

Peter, if we want to hold Andrew Cuomo accountable, then I need you to join me now. [**There are no other options, and there is no time to waste.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58064797:6cVRhxl0N:m:1:3253819041:1AB83A59AE16C25AF07AD84B6926755C:r)

Andrew Cuomo needs to be arrested and prosecuted. The only way to get that done is if you join me, and we lay on the pressure.

Thank you,

Elise Stefanik

Paid for by Elise for Congress

But even with this news, we can’t afford to let up now. name: Donna Imam
subject: We need an eviction moratorium. Now.
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33459962/298942626/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmQ5ODBkMC03YmY0LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=knBxeG5Eui-SI11FdYmIT-b0Xn4ZkvHgtDz4jRPDIXU=) Friend,

I've been so humbled by your support during our first full month on the campaign trail. Thanks to you -- and hundreds of grassroots supporters across the country -- we met the mark on our July end-of-month goal. _Thank you!_

It's tough to spend too much time celebrating this achievement as Sunday marked a somber day for millions of families across the country. The federal eviction moratorium officially ended, and authorities began eviction proceedings.

**According to the latest Census Bureau July survey, more than 7.4 million families are behind on rent and 3.6 million said they would have to leave their homes in the next two months due to eviction.** It's absolutely unacceptable that as the top 1% in this country added $8 trillion in wealth in the past year, anyone would face homelessness or eviction -- especially while the pandemic continues to devastate many families and livelihoods.

The American Rescue Plan allocated $46 billion in emergency rental assistance to help families facing eviction. Not requiring that these funds be distributed timely to prevent evictions is unforgivable.

**This is not the time to leave working families behind.** I'm urging the Biden administration to extend the CDC eviction moratorium right away while states distribute rental assistance to families in need. Democrats need to step up for the millions of Americans now worried about being kicked out of their homes.

Thanks for standing with me,

Donna

clean_body: he’s too chicken to say what he really thinks | | | = | | Glenn Youngkin dropped out of another debate, Derek. As a result, Virginia’s only statewide-broadcast Governor’s debate will be cancelled. This is bad for all Virginians. The AARP Virginia State Director said Youngkin’s move was “a missed opportunity for voters.” Derek, we know why Youngkin is hiding. He knows that if voters hear his extreme right-wing views and support for Donald Trump, they’ll never vote for him. We can’t let him get away with hiding. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = ** Thanks for doing your part. More soon, Terry McAuliffe = Terry for VA PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. Paid for by Terry for Virginia

name: Dr. Neil Shah
subject: I'll Beat Tim Walz - Join Me
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Dr
body:
| Peter, Tim Walz and the Radical Left keep getting things wrong. **They used COVID-19 to shut down our businesses, lock us in our homes and force our children to wear masks.** Their anti-law enforcement mentality has ushered in the largest spike in crime in our cities, with violent mobs ruling the streets. They push Critical Race Theory to brainwash our kids to hate their neighbors, their country and themselves.
## **It has to STOP!**
**My name is Dr. Neil Shah and I’m running to be the next Governor of Minnesota. It’s time to stop career politicians from destroying our state. I love Minnesota, and I think it’s worth saving.** I’m a family man first. Sara and I have three children and live in the north metro. We’ve built a successful business, employing dozens of people, and making a real impact in the lives of our patients. In my work, I remove deadly cancers. When Governor Walz unilaterally decided to stop elective surgeries, it shut down my business and cost my patients dearly. Now it’s time to remove the cancers of unilateral emergency powers and radical leftism - and it’s going to take an outsider to do it. Watch my video. [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5kxRmIu0rXokwNNMTv35VYGk&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=intro_email_new&n=1) **As your Governor, I pledge to make sure lockdowns, mask mandates, changed election laws and forced vaccinations never happen again. Which is why I proudly signed the Action 4 Liberty Never Again Pledge this morning.** Nothing angers me more than when career politicians and the radical left go after our children. The indoctrination they are pushing in our schools is a real threat to the America I knew growing up as the child of immigrants.
## **CRT is cancer – it must be removed!**
If you are sick and tired of the media and radical left telling us that people of color can’t get ahead in our society, [join my campaign](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=iUaD1gacZHU3dYzSqkV0rOkbRklTyTNtmBTRPmVdijk&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=intro_email_new&n=2) and help me flip the narrative. I won’t bow down to the Woke Mob like Tim Walz. I won’t stand back like the career politicians in St. Paul and let Minnesota become the next failed state like California, New York or Illinois. **Career politicians are ruining this state. That’s why we need an outsider to remove the cancer of radical leftism. Learn how you can help #SaveSota by visiting my website at[electneil.com](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=iUaD1gacZHU3dYzSqkV0rOkbRklTyTNtmBTRPmVdijk&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=intro_email_new&n=3).** Sincerely, Dr. Neil Shah Conservative Candidate for Governor [http://www.electneil.com/](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=5JezZIIJQQrVuUtHI_sfDKYjXcFcnny7CTruXj7gH44&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=intro_email_new&n=4) Prepared and paid for by the Dr. Neil Shah for Governor Committee, 855 Village Center Dr #245, North Oaks, MN 55127
---

| Peter,
Biden's DOJ is afraid of us getting answers...
After I asked questions for months about the treatment of January 6 prisoners and were subsequently ignored, we sent notice to let these bureaucrats know that we were coming to do our job and provide the oversight that the American people deserve!
And what did they do in response? They LOCKED US OUT!

| What are they hiding?!
We still have gotten no answers from Biden's DOJ as they continue to allow serious allegations about the treatment of American citizens go unaddressed.
They want the only source of information about January 6th to be Nancy Pelosi and Liz Cheney's witch hunt commission - but I'm not the type of Congressman that will just go away.
I will continue to show up to press on important issues, and demand that we are given transparency! [Can I count on you to join me?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hXcEX3ppDKc8Yf4AS-7eN5yWqLmQjFNEs-vpwMYu2X37uwIgpKNY5fhCeuV9Hj0FnVVYZoZHTbIwn856XxzjuukosqD90DYgtDaisLnnJZaA6_CZYaVMZAROiAPU-jh9pel1gvoqEb9reaJR-2b3Wp62ex5NsKQe134c5BrG6JHt_leRw3iNcQ==&c=Mp0OH-hTyah_H_DugpGe8jOmcHvO1zDF9kMT7BceW6lWLB7os5B47g==&ch=8lGHI98nLmF0xQ1YWyEDXLXM2MjV3iXjykpt1dE9br4WWRU1BpI3YA==)

name: Larry Elder | Recall Newsom
subject: It's not too late for CA
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LARRY ELDER BALLOT MEASURE COMMITTEE RECALL NEWSOM
body:
We can't begin to save California without FIRST voting YES to recall Newsom. | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58064521:6QT9Wxl8N:m:1:3253819041:9BB633F115E8042B5D9EB4B8C6202FD7:r)

---
Peter,

To say Gavin Newsom has failed California is a HUGE understatement.

Gavin Newsom has...
Destroyed...
Betrayed...
Ruined...
Endangered...
Repressed...
Impoverished California.

This is why we're fighting to recall Gavin Newsom, [**and we need your help.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58064521:6QT9Wxl8N:m:1:3253819041:9BB633F115E8042B5D9EB4B8C6202FD7:r)

We can't begin to save California and restore it to the place where people once again come to achieve the American Dream without **FIRST voting YES to recall Newsom.**

[**Will you join us and help recall Gavin Newsom on September 14th by chipping in $25, $50, $100 or even more today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58064521:6QT9Wxl8N:m:1:3253819041:9BB633F115E8042B5D9EB4B8C6202FD7:r)

[**JOIN LARRY ELDER
RECALL GAVIN NEWSOM -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58064521:6QT9Wxl8N:m:1:3253819041:9BB633F115E8042B5D9EB4B8C6202FD7:r)
Under Gavin Newsom, people and businesses are fleeing California in droves. Those who choose to stay face rampant crime & homelessness, a broken education system, high cost of living and high taxes.

_What has happened to California is both heartbreaking and infuriating_

**It 's not too late to save our state, but first we need to get rid of the man responsible for its demise.**

Recalling Gavin Newsom is question #1 on the September 14th recall election ballot, and it's the first step to getting California back on the path to prosperity, opportunity and exceptionalism.

[**Will you contribute $25, $50, $100 or even more now to help us rally Californians who are ready to save California and recall failed governor Gavin Newsom?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58064521:6QT9Wxl8N:m:1:3253819041:9BB633F115E8042B5D9EB4B8C6202FD7:r)

Thank you,

Larry Elder
Recall Newsom
Ballot Committee

[**JOIN LARRY ELDER
RECALL GAVIN NEWSOM -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58064521:6QT9Wxl8N:m:1:3253819041:9BB633F115E8042B5D9EB4B8C6202FD7:r)
| "Gavin Newsom has failed California. He's raised our taxes, closed our schools, put millions out of work, killed any number of small businesses, released thousands of criminals into our communities, and allowed the homeless to take over our streets. It's time to hold Gavin Newsom accountable for the nightmare he's made of California. Join me in voting YES to recall Gavin Newsom on September 14th." - LARRY ELDER

body:
Today is Election Day! I wanted to remind you to get out and vote in today’s primary election if there are candidates on the ballot in your local com Friend, Today is Election Day! I wanted to remind you to get out and vote in today’s primary election if there are candidates on the ballot in your local community. [](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=193a7a328e0e45a8b337de17cf41cc4e&_e=M3NTQQIvYCM3329ln3xttbKsyKX10nYOqsRF6CpAyV31HRPwe0XU5GOLgUgL9xl48onvnKu20Lb7og-3JcC64Y7n2kon6CPSq1KtHllMcmtWEMM4BRSoYVdMSsa-n72NLMyyJ5174zJ4JpHJ-6je_88RtPMGR38mNjtuUnTTgmuw_Luu6e9B1sEjEfbgfN5PIiGsgTFQuiEisWUDCBqrGFiK6kVpK5G1BV_yDn8cRFyRDB5nelFuERBaipGIJrCd5-hh1byXapqvjfc92hJreuTv_ItKwmNEpKZ2IWZwVkw%3D) I also wanted to share a useful tool to find your updated polling place: **Click here to find your polling place:**[**https://myvoteinfo.voteks.org/VoterView**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=193a7a328e0e45a8b337de17cf41cc4e&_e=M3NTQQIvYCM3329ln3xttbKsyKX10nYOqsRF6CpAyV31HRPwe0XU5GOLgUgL9xl49vjtGzdRFjilWkpBeQ1wL5Afuu5dz5gR-9xYKt83KJRiau4ck6FS5KX_ymBx6tx_GKCtWJV8pi7_Q9mp8g6uUNDfBHKcZtmd_2pIGhSqDQKhw7HyYfsUKmgzlDm9Guu1uUA6FBdbbNj9Soy0QbCFrTd7BNx1PfC_rW_umgcpi7ULQiw2RhCR406-hYSAiA4F08lADSlaFsUn2x_NgyS6-AW39VP5ieaNvNWt1Strhs4%3D) Today’s election will determine which candidates appear on the ballot in November. With several key school board and municipal positions up for election this year, we can’t underestimate how important it is to have strong representation in our local governments. If COVID has shown us anything, it's that local leadership matters. I need you to get out and vote today to ensure that Kansas’s strongest conservatives secure their place on the ballot! [** FIND MY POLLING PLACE **](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=193a7a328e0e45a8b337de17cf41cc4e&_e=M3NTQQIvYCM3329ln3xttbKsyKX10nYOqsRF6CpAyV31HRPwe0XU5GOLgUgL9xl4gIlmLlrj3FpYRwrpXlIYoMRaNM_wAOVyfvO-WdeSW0p-5JAjKFEKNfS_aa4Ya3yEVjjcQVaW0Q6zCRdCUhmcJHCdEAcLuXRKiAsaq8ki5Tz_CASk9fFaJRzTmUk4Pl0t7mXtgm3KmmDshiiF_Ia8NKpu49Oi_bdoUBNxqqhCNxpi1BHz7TbidlM2khsakEKJVR-sL5NMzK0FGPBv8c7Xv0cuVQPzZuDJaQAQWORAJbQ%3D) Please friend, get out and vote today to ensure that we’re able to elect the best-possible conservative candidates in this November’s election. Thank you for making your voice heard by casting your vote today. Sincerely, Derek Schmidt | |

body:
We aren't going back. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4midotBTmOTuD1jArJaDdodvlhb9UL81jxEPuw6y7k3OhwmlU-uYaL2WrAUgsNMZGiKKYnsZM6oTLstLOrEL5PvQZbEN2v7jYQVhWybZ6WVNrsBTt5gw6UmQDr-dWV--hlAF0EkJO1flnQ4SR5Y-NLOZ5RGU_wIyVhEJuDipl2nnYhlKopNuB0RMaoszilvUph8LOKDCrIEY_SBIQLkDYc6Yux_-6Ow4YYZQ5rhK_0ezsgnRClrUSKHDoMfztSo8EqPkYdjmEyKOQgbN3JTTf8Oo4KunWghtkevKtQyx0-NtJ8/3e5/XpHGC00PSLmNMhMh3pcppQ/h0/0FOEMzmUxZ7-yHCs_M7BsVT1z9vLDKtP685DYZfL5JU)
Derek,

I’m reaching out today to ask you to split a contribution between my campaign and Common Good VA. **[You can do so right here >>](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4midotBTmOTuD1jArJaDdodvlhb9UL81jxEPuw6y7k3OhzF_gWi66Re_PAO3FMJn_Rl9drhOEWgikSj8I-ZhryOvXkf8r48AKbE68SWepeFR5tqqklKIeGAN494UvSDC0U3_pmONxMGtKoCHaXHYJ7XhKEJW3sVzjonzdwPMYPPNY3_jXTUhac7qcFUBA9NL2Td2fVzMwbPN1dT-BRoSGJvd6MMzHuEIJYu_btnwumuMHv4k6NflY_Uo95FouiM7v2mqElszydVy_cf3Bdj3T8y7W8AtjRjDXlA4Nf6DZkYDwA/3e5/XpHGC00PSLmNMhMh3pcppQ/h1/pp3rdymxH2p5A1gs3JduPbVLqo_bBMALUgmUgyPU3s4)**

There is so much at stake in New Jersey this year, and your support is critical to building a true grassroots campaign with the strength to keep moving New Jersey forward. Our Republican opponent tied himself as close to Donald Trump as possible to win the nomination.

**We need to send a clear message: we’re not going back.**

We have made so much progress over the last three-plus years on the issues that matter most, like tackling climate change head-on, passing common-sense gun safety measures, putting our state on the path to a $15 minimum wage, and so much more.

But our work is not yet done. We can’t risk moving our state backwards. We have to lift up every community and make sure everyone, no matter where they live or where they’re from, has a seat at the table.

**[That’s why we’re building a true grassroots campaign from the ground up to win. Will you consider pitching in to Common Good VA and my campaign to help elect Democrats up and down the ticket?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4midotBTmOTuD1jArJaDdodvlhb9UL81jxEPuw6y7k3Ohy-yYpAkVF34NeBOM1B8hJHqeMlhRPxt7Ot8C5flnXci90_BxK-KBAMtu6vDhZUu44Pasr_wHMwzdJ0U3HbXwDJZ_uIi07jC0cCkC1HYeI4iO_wUzJ63xWAOEO_MTU3aophx_RVlABYRPkZgHX42tbnmM-Dv38ieeZLqq4Ac-0ulbC_qK5Miju4tkiSQUkwYWFmOptxtviCGqQrvhK9SWO150jwBxQs5k-I1dAb1NU7oKrrq99kHfYPAVw5VnmrGCo/3e5/XpHGC00PSLmNMhMh3pcppQ/h2/ivQk-YHndTd2B3NLf390IRmhwuoxMBvvYA5eRS3FFQk)** **[ Donate $25 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4midotBTmOTuD1jArJaDdodvsNwpCipSx4BnQ9PQmgfYzUG4TKE9-HAM5J8kWs6wFexjGK_iCAiqD2_sb3JKqVtWY-QlBYsqppxAxXBGsHCxqsUfTSJ9rRSAfr1Vy31cxTHaJMok8Q-3cWOXCL3WHunuHEVCoSW2F3-IWPjMct5Y2crUSWhoHAUwXF7F6v1Z18mLcScNdE7hpeg_92W6YgyJobO6tLA8mQcJFLv5wuwuK8l5JOGhxszEiGBdXtbYh-aRNTfPUP1wsiSB5VEbTNvDzB2WG-IEF9ARHbn_iTHBUpMv2GWy706hhgPXBcuX95v/3e5/XpHGC00PSLmNMhMh3pcppQ/h3/9jZFYOJDke8V8Y1pD7Ap3-hMXcgig3hKQN4XjF6aD5U)

clean_body: We aren't going back. | | | Derek, I’m reaching out today to ask you to split a contribution between my campaign and Common Good VA. There is so much at stake in New Jersey this year, and your support is critical to building a true grassroots campaign with the strength to keep moving New Jersey forward. Our Republican opponent tied himself as close to Donald Trump as possible to win the nomination. We need to send a clear message: we’re not going back. We have made so much progress over the last three-plus years on the issues that matter most, like tackling climate change head-on, passing common-sense gun safety measures, putting our state on the path to a $15 minimum wage, and so much more. But our work is not yet done. We can’t risk moving our state backwards. We have to lift up every community and make sure everyone, no matter where they live or where they’re from, has a seat at the table. Thank you for your continued support of our campaign. Hope to see you out on the trail soon. Onward, Phil | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Terry McAuliffe, please .

body:
I wanted to make sure you saw that my friend Kat Cammack and I are fighting back against Nancy Pelosi’s tyrannical mask mandate.

| Friend,

I wanted to make sure you saw that my friend Kat Cammack and I are fighting back against Nancy Pelosi's tyrannical mask mandate. I was one of the first to be fined for resisting their unscientific demands to wear a mask, and Kat just blew up Pelosi's order for violating our freedoms and liberties!
In case you missed it, Pelosi says she will report us to the Sergeant at Arms for not wearing masks even though we are vaccinated! However, as she continues to fine House members like myself for protesting the policy, many are asking - where is the science to back this up?

| It gets worse...
Pelosi has also ordered Capitol Police to ARREST staff and visitors that do not wear a mask in our United States Capitol.

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: El Paso
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE, POWEREDXPEOPLE
body:
Two years ago today a Texas man killed 23 people at a Walmart in El Paso.

In the manifesto he published shortly before the murders he wrote that
he’d come to repel the “Hispanic invasion of Texas,” language that echoed
what former President Donald Trump used to describe immigrants, asylum
seekers and refugees.

A USA Today report found that Trump had used the words "predator,"
"invasion," "alien," "killer," "criminal" and "animal" at his rallies
while discussing immigration more than 500 times.

The newly emboldened white supremacy movement, the extraordinarily easy
access to powerful firearms (the killer’s mother, after discovering that
her son had purchased an AK-47, called the Allen, Texas police department
asking for help. Unfortunately, it is perfectly legal in Texas to buy a
weapon originally designed for war, and so there was nothing they could do
for her, or for the 23 people who would be murdered in El Paso), and the
constant scapegoating of immigrants by President Trump, Texas Governor
Greg Abbott and the modern Republican party made this possible.

And so did everyone who turned a blind eye to what was happening in this
country.

It’s tempting for some to chalk the El Paso killings up to mental illness,
violent video games, or lack of religion (Texas Lieutenant Governor Dan
Patrick blamed them on all three). That would allow us to “move on,” and
absolve us of responsibility.

But it should be clear to us that the Walmart shooting is an example of
the white supremacist terrorism that is more prevalent in this country
today than at any time since the last era of Jim Crow.

We see it in the white, masked gunmen who mass on the steps of state
capitols across the country, seeking to intimidate lawmakers and the
public; we see it in Klansmen and Nazis chanting “Jews will not replace
us” in Charlottesville; we see it in a Michigan militia’s attempt to
kidnap and execute Governor Gretchen Whitmer; we see it in the
insurrectionists carrying Confederate battle flags into the U.S. Capitol
on January 6th, where five people including a capitol police officer were
killed in an attempt to violently overthrow the 2020 presidential
election.

And we see it in the effort to entrench white power in state legislatures
across this country at the expense of minority voters through aggressive
racial gerrymandering and voter suppression laws.

That’s what we’re up against today. That’s what El Paso was up against on
August 3rd, 2019.

And that’s what we’ll be up against for as long as we accept this as our
fate.

But we don’t have to. As long as we’re willing to acknowledge that it is
happening, call it out where we see it, and fight like hell to overcome
it, we have a chance to come through.

Here are some things we can do:

Pass legislation that will significantly reduce access to firearms
intended for use in war, along with universal background checks and
extreme risk protection orders; vigorously pursue prosecution against
white supremacist terrorists and those who fund and encourage them; reject
all language and policies that seek to dehumanize immigrants; and stop the
rollback of voting rights in this country by passing pro-democracy
legislation like the For the People Act.

Today, my thoughts are with the survivors from August 3rd, 2019 and the
family members who lost a loved one on that day. We can only imagine their
grief and the pain that this anniversary brings them.

But to truly honor them, let us devote ourselves to fighting the forces
that brought such unspeakable evil and death to our community and that
continue to threaten the future of this country.

I hope you will continue to join me in this work.

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1001&akid=147717%2E444211%2EDNnBWI

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE, POWEREDXPEOPLE.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.

Hey Peter, it's Governor Ron DeSantis. You know me -- I'm not one to mince words.
**Neither is President Trump.**
That's why I proudly supported him when he just made this bold statement: _" The survival of America depends upon our ability to elect Republicans at every level."_
The Liberal Media, the Radical Socialists in Congress, and Joe Biden's cronies are plowing ahead to FUNDAMENTALLY change everything that makes America great.

We either let the Democrats turn America into a Socialist country and tear President Trump's legacy apart...

_This won't be easy -- we need your help._
...And you don't strike me as someone who gives up when the going gets tough.

For America,

I'm running for Congress to stop this madness. If we're going to fix our broken immigration laws and stand up to the Radical Left, we need to elect strong conservatives who aren't afraid to stand up for our nation's value. _This is so dangerous, Peter._

Despite the January 6th insurrection, inspired by misinformation surrounding President Biden’s victory, my opponent continues to reject the truth.

Anyone who refuses to accept election results, anyone who undermines faith in our democracy, anyone who spreads blatant misinformation and fear tactics, has absolutely no place in leadership ‐‐ _especially as Lt. Governor of our state._

**I condemn this behavior, and call on Winsome Sears to drop out of this event.**

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Sign on if you agree we must extend the eviction moratorium
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

On Sunday night, and again on Monday, I stayed outside the Capitol until the early hours of the morning with Reps. Cori Bush, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, and others to protest the end of the eviction moratorium.
I’d like the chance to explain how we got to this point, and what happens next, but first:
[**Please add your name here to demand that the House and the Senate reconvene to address the eviction crisis, and to tell President Biden to extend the moratorium.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33466563/298966528/76930927?refcode2=34f8b774-8ff4-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210803-1-full&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGY4Yjc3NC04ZmY0LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cp2n1k--ew22w9glQCY_wd8Qr5Aa2fdLVNSbYPzoWms=&emci=b6c028de-83f4-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=34f8b774-8ff4-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=24719896)
**[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33466564/298966529/76930927?refcode2=34f8b774-8ff4-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210803-1-full&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGY4Yjc3NC04ZmY0LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cp2n1k--ew22w9glQCY_wd8Qr5Aa2fdLVNSbYPzoWms=&emci=b6c028de-83f4-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=34f8b774-8ff4-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=24719896)**
Okay, here’s what’s happened. The eviction moratorium first passed in March of 2020 as part of the CARES Act, and has been extended several times since to protect Americans from losing their homes during the COVID-19 pandemic.
**But on Saturday, the moratorium expired — and because neither Congress nor the White House took action to extend it, evictions have begun.**
Right now, approximately 1 in 6 renters are behind on their rent payments — so if we don’t extend the moratorium, millions could be evicted. That would be inhumane in any context, but as the Delta variant surges, it’s nothing short of a public health crisis.
Stopping mass evictions will require immediate action, so please:
[**Sign on to demand that the House and the Senate reconvene to address the evictions crisis, and to tell President Biden to extend the moratorium.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33466565/298966530/744149567?refcode2=34f8b774-8ff4-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210803-1-full&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGY4Yjc3NC04ZmY0LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cp2n1k--ew22w9glQCY_wd8Qr5Aa2fdLVNSbYPzoWms=&emci=b6c028de-83f4-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=34f8b774-8ff4-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=24719896)
The White House is shirking responsibility by insisting that there’s nothing it can do to stop the ongoing crisis. That’s simply not true. The White House has extended the moratorium before and can do so again.
But if President Biden won’t act, it’s absolutely necessary that Congress does. That’s why, despite the fact that we’re on August recess, I’m still in DC fighting to extend the moratorium and put a stop to evictions. Thank you, as always, for supporting me in this fight.
Onward,
Mondaire

name: Team Engel
subject: 🚨🚨🚨 BREAKING 🚨🚨🚨 GOP frontrunner jumps in AZ-02 race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
A new opponent joins the race for AZ-02, and immediately becomes the Republican frontrunner.
---
Friend,
The Republicans have themselves a frontrunner. Gov. Ducey's right-hand man in Tucson launched his campaign for AZ-02 this morning.

This isn't surprising, but it is scary. Our new opponent was hand-picked by Gov Ducey, and was urged to run by some of the AZ GOP's biggest donors. We know what Republicans would do with this seat, and now they're one step closer to buying it back.

Whether it’s privatizing Social Security, repealing the Affordable Care Act, or prioritizing corporate profits over protecting our environment, GOP candidates for AZ-02 have _always_ pushed policies that hurt Southern Arizonans.

**Our new Republican opponent will be better funded than any of their previous candidates in AZ-02. They want this seat back, and it may be the tipping point for control of Congress.**

Ducey's failed policies have hurt Arizona schools and prolonged the COVID crisis. His corrupt administration has fought for corporations and the super rich at the expense of working families, seniors, and our children. **We don't need a Ducey clone representing Southern Arizona in Congress.**

_**This is an all hands on deck situation.**_

We need to send a clear message that AZ-02 will not go to Doug Ducey and his anti-choice, anti-science, anti-environment cronies. [**Will you make your voice loud and clear by chipping in to help us fight back?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33466701/298966987/41694283?refcode=X_080321_NewOpponent&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTRiOTcyMi05MGY0LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RVsVn0b6VQuS96ycMKbqTkMNj0rbInMvMxu1uqABGrY=)

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: This takeover will last for years
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
My father's America First agenda is on the brink of destruction.
|

name: Team Franchot
subject: PHOTOS: Our Action-Packed Month of July!
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Hi Peter,
Peter Franchot is building a people-powered movement to create a people-centered government -- and over the past month, he’s been hard at work meeting with Marylanders on main streets, in their homes, and at community events across Maryland to build the growing Team Franchot coalition.
Spending the past month on the campaign trail, we’ve seen first-hand the energy and excitement that this movement is bringing to communities in all corners of the state. From creating 100,000 new jobs for our working families, to taking bold leadership on climate change, to tackling the student debt crisis and so much more, Marylanders from Accident to Crisfield are fired up for the concrete points of progress that Peter Franchot will deliver to our communities as Governor.
Now, we’re very excited to share with you a photo recap of our action-packed month of July. Keep reading below -- you may be in one of our photos! But if you haven’t had a chance to meet Peter yet and join us at an event, you’ll have more than enough opportunities to do so in the weeks and months ahead as we continue building this movement to change the way that government does business.
We’ve had an action-packed summer of exciting events, and we’re just getting started! If you are able, will you chip in to help maintain Peter Franchot’s momentum as the frontrunner in the Democratic field? With your help, we can continue the important work of building our statewide operation as we ramp up for 2022.
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julyinreview?amount=20.22]Thank you,
Team Franchot
Here's our recap of July:
Over July 4 weekend, Peter celebrated Independence Day with Marylanders across the state at parades, festivals and barbecues in Dundalk, Towson, Randallstown, Catonsville, Columbia, Somerset, Chevy Chase, and Severna Park. We were so thrilled by the enthusiasm from all the friends and neighbors who came out to celebrate!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julyinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julyinreview?amount=20.22]On July 9, Peter spoke with voters in Annapolis at the District 30 Democratic Club meeting, and enjoyed catching up with friends like Mayor Gavin Buckley, Alderwoman Elly Tierney, and candidate Keanuú Smith-Brown.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julyinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julyinreview?amount=20.22]The next day, he rose bright and early to visit Baltimore’s Fells Point Farmers Market, and the 32nd Street Farmers Market in Waverly to enjoy freshly farmed produce and meet local vendors and community association leaders.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julyinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julyinreview?amount=20.22]Later that day, he enjoyed a fantastic picnic hosted by the Central Baltimore County Democratic Club. Special thanks to our great friend and supporter, Club President Henry Callegary, for hosting us!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julyinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julyinreview?amount=20.22]On July 13, Peter had a blast enjoying crab cakes with over 130 friends, supporters and allies at Jimmy’s Famous Seafood in Baltimore.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julyinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julyinreview?amount=20.22]Next, he stopped by to visit his friends Senator Craig Zucker and Chairman of the Legislative Black Caucus Delegate Darryl Barnes at their events. A special thanks to Craig for his endorsement of our campaign!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julyinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julyinreview?amount=20.22]On July 16, he headed to Randallstown to enjoy a community movie night with voters, where he was thrilled to speak with Speaker Adrienne Jones.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julyinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julyinreview?amount=20.22]On July 17, he was honored to receive the endorsement of Chosun Media, and spend the evening with the vibrant Korean American community that they serve.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julyinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julyinreview?amount=20.22]Later in July, Peter had a blast speaking with friends, supporters and volunteers at the Maryland Democratic Party’s Welcome Back BBQ in Bowie.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julyinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julyinreview?amount=20.22]On July 31, Peter rounded out an action-packed month by visiting the Frederick Farmers Market with Councilman Kai Hagen, and spending lunch with the United Maryland Muslim Council Board, where he discussed how we can continue to empower communities of all faiths.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julyinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julyinreview?amount=20.22] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julyinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julyinreview?amount=20.22]
By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States

name: Alek Skarlatos
subject: I'm thankful for you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
Your assistance to my in July was much needed, and for that I'm grateful to you for all of your help. I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=0add1b84c7684b57af4a5d957f2e2073&_e=aYxAPGOn0CZpJ1U59Shd951YVZnWW4WpVdxVVGoVUHW2h5LpJlevL53K3XtQZi5LoA_FRaLr8Egu1UqTtGrQq0iu0rK2TUie1OPra_BgD5to2jqHCwWXs6GLJoy0lT3JgvYI7hlIiRaT3nbe7gjRTyXWrQiqzBUNhxEU9MHFDt4YSJF_UTtiS2pC3g1pgt0GL0uX5qdYsyYilZRT1Q7mNEEmR-bMj_Zhf3YsgTXEkxZT7-bz_zmFdmfAM_5F-JF2F1PqVxjYwOXU796C4o62OlWyXToPwkbBPSV6C8tOtLGTLBaYKKQdbrvMlCXZ1y5DoglbhHnuEw2XEaRJgm_nO4RYwUmmNO8FBXv2Qw1xwE20RtAIuFoKRbZUt1AxdCVfoxmkx5otw4_LhZ-86uAnarjklZ8exxzd4PWsSE-Xv0JsMvFpN4rY45uQry9J3qQ-jtMPgnl4JaIgDlHKkTJtXw%3D%3D)

Peter,

I won’t take up too much of your time today, I’m just writing to say thank you for helping me continue to reach online fundraising goals even amidst the slowest time of year for fundraising.

**Since I announced on May 3rd, more than 9,000 conservatives from across the country have made a gift to my campaign with the intention of sending a conservative to Congress who will represent our shared values**.

My opponent, Peter DeFazio, won’t be easy to beat, but I know that with you on our team we are going to send him into retirement. And retirement is surely the place for Peter right now; who in their right mind would proactively support – much less lead the charge – for an additional $3 trillion in government spending after having spent over $6 trillion in the last year?

We have a lot of work to do in preparation for this next battle, and from based on the fact that **I was outraised in the second quarter by Free Money DeFazio** , they’ll be better prepared this time around than they were last year.

I look forward to continuing our work together.

Thank you very much.
Alek Skarlatos
Republican for Congress

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: I didn’t study poverty — I lived it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
#

Friend,
Growing up, I watched my mom struggle almost every month to cover the rent. I know first-hand what it's like to face an eviction notice. I know the panic of packing everything I own in plastic bags to hurry to the next place.
That's why I take it personally that Congress went home for the summer without extending protections to keep people housed during this pandemic.
I can't stress this enough: We need more working people in Washington. People who know these struggles personally. People for whom these decisions aren't hypothetical.
I'm in this race because no one like me has ever had a seat at the table in the U.S. Senate.
I didn't study poverty in school or learn about it from an internship — I lived it.
I got my first job at age 12 washing dishes because I had to. I ran for State Rep because no one was listening to families like ours.
**And now I'm running for U.S. Senate for the same reason. But I can't get there alone — it’s going to take a big coalition of folks like us standing together to bring about real change.**
[So, friend, I’m personally asking: Could you chip in a few bucks to fuel our campaign today? It really would mean the world to me.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33467970/298972946/-353695395?refcode2=210e0db1-95f4-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210803-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTBlMGRiMS05NWY0LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oKtHc3-ixsX2ePt8dzYhEEYag4CEOvRYPjv4f3ABtuY=)

clean_body: Friend, Growing up, I watched my mom struggle almost every month to cover the rent. I know first-hand what it's like to face an eviction notice. I know the panic of packing everything I own in plastic bags to hurry to the next place. That's why I take it personally that Congress went home for the summer without extending protections to keep people housed during this pandemic. I can't stress this enough: We need more working people in Washington. People who know these struggles personally. People for whom these decisions aren't hypothetical. I'm in this race because no one like me has ever had a seat at the table in the U.S. Senate. I didn't study poverty in school or learn about it from an internship — I lived it. I got my first job at age 12 washing dishes because I had to. I ran for State Rep because no one was listening to families like ours. And now I'm running for U.S. Senate for the same reason. But I can't get there alone — it’s going to take a big coalition of folks like us standing together to bring about real change. = = Your donation will put us that much closer to finally delivering a government that works for us working people. Thanks for being a part of this campaign. I'm so grateful for everything you do. All my best, Malcolm * Paid for by Malcolm PAC Malcolm PAC PO Box 22395 Philadelphia, PA 19110 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but if you need to, to unsubscribe. By submitting your mobile number, you agree to receive periodic campaign updates from Malcolm PAC. Msg & data rates may apply. Text HELP for more info, STOP to stop receiving messages.

name: John Castorani
subject: Thank you so much
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
body:
My campaign for Congress had another great month of online fundraising in July, and I just wanted to quickly say thank you.For six years, I hunted the Benghazi terrorists. Then we elected Joe Biden, I quit my job to hold politicians accountable. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.johncastorani.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_s=d06799d0f211440abccfe0f0028fb308&_t=0equg4lGOErqpN6FYZTFKjEW9RGe5081cS2SUUjgfWtvemfbYnZb-IrW96qs5f7gqWuGfSKBwG3oQwM35ANwPri3t0fGmOJ_BST4hfI8E8Ie95FRk-Vskmw-aDKRbiFfrIWkiGclRR_BBROUSVhRXK7oLAVaAjvi_l1EsldXOV8%3D) | [](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=d06799d0f211440abccfe0f0028fb308&_e=eGS3yAGhRMD8uotlHhbSyjoAOtiEw7x8C_LZHGBzW2dAqs7_Of1EWWPqRPkgqH917AXcKavrGfo2QJIh6XdzxBzgjMROSdMubEqZH4moqq2RvSq-bAORSgVA-fbJ4I2ZZHcD-82HYll_N8dZ-MnqKR8a2ebBOQSXXaY_WSHMeBz9ZeOdiTmy9VbLhhuAtaDxgcGLq_2_QnSrABeLREIrQxJE1BCCd7phhGf5aQxACB0VNpg3rJ51mpBeuSHXBu0lkEUiNG6Sq7uMC8bRSulYM2sVcR4CBlF4e_49zsDi5tFs6zQTC1H8lDXTObs99Thby2_Q_HkHAAfQLrQccIDJplSBXz5n26oAVVGR9SVKNLwIxgPkWk0CPZtBID3YFo1il0D7K8Ktnlp9P0xUxNSV0YN6junwX4MKfXBqmcfChkouVjnojG-SARgyEc58B-ylHUr5NdBaCTnX3HIQiZxJzhSUtdFNJFeF035y8qL7JF8%3D)
---

Fellow Conservative,

I wanted to briefly reach out today to say thank you for your generosity in the month of July.

I never imagined that we would have the success we’ve seen raising funds online for a congressional campaign; heck, I never thought I’d be running for Congress when I was little boy.

Suffice to say, I’m immensely grateful and humbled that you decided to support my campaign, and I hope that I’ll prove worthy of your generosity over the coming months as I build out my campaign.

I promise you that your investment in me won’t be wasted. Virginia’s 7th congressional district will be one of the most hotly contested races in the entire country next year, and It’s probably that the House majority will be decided by the victor in this race.
| [**MAKE A GIFT TODAY
HELP ME FLIP THIS SEAT** **››**](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=d06799d0f211440abccfe0f0028fb308&_e=eGS3yAGhRMD8uotlHhbSyjoAOtiEw7x8C_LZHGBzW2dAqs7_Of1EWWPqRPkgqH917AXcKavrGfo2QJIh6XdzxBzgjMROSdMubEqZH4moqq2RvSq-bAORSgVA-fbJ4I2ZZHcD-82HYll_N8dZ-MnqKR8a2ebBOQSXXaY_WSHMeBz9ZeOdiTmy9VbLhhuAtaDxgcGLq_2_QnSrABeLREIrQxJE1BCCd7phhGf5aQxACB0VNpg3rJ51mpBeuSHXBu0lkEUiNG6Sq7uMC8bRSulYM4Rm3p39xV3dg1SJcHfqkT5_bkWyE57Tzx2Dwzrpvh_-6dSG65LFNLqV4yp1uUZd1nV_Cv1IrMOJRq3K-xdZTqkhTcE34oa_R1XABwxGCCQJf5PBCRLR6OVEBMR5lqOfKZ3Ge3idCWPBQOUV6ND1oDI2SBsnk98zQCykWGCI274QrySCcJbaH1EFG9kbnNzWvzubOPNdkcYWf2RptvWoNVA%3D)

John Castorani

Suffice to say, I’m immensely grateful and humbled that you decided to support my campaign, and I hope that I’ll prove worthy of your generosity over the coming months as I build out my campaign. I promise you that your investment in me won’t be wasted. Virginia’s 7th congressional district will be one of the most hotly contested races in the entire country next year, and It’s probably that the House majority will be decided by the victor in this race. | For America John Castorani Republican Candidate for Congress VA-07 | Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia P.O. BOX 390 ORANGE, VA 22960

Democrats are running strong candidates in more districts than ever, but that means we need your help to make sure they have the resources they need to win. = Our Commonwealth has changed so much over the past few years, and I know that is because of supporters like you. The Democratic Party of Virginia staff and I are going to do everything we can to help elect Democrats all across the Commonwealth. I hope you’ll join us.
