name: =?utf-8?Q?Congressman=20Paul=20Gosar?=
subject: Democrats are holding political prisoners
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GOSAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
It's not an exaggeration. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drpaulgosar/democrats-political-prisoners-2472806?e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | [ ](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=7f63f52bd8&e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | Dear Peter,

Democrats are holding political prisoners in Washington D.C.

Non-violent offenders have been charged with trumped-up felonies after trespassing at the Capitol on January 6.

The Justice Department is holding them in solitary confinement until their undetermined trial dates, and not allowing them to confer with lawyers.

The violations of their Constitutional rights are happening right now -- and it should terrify all of us.

[**I'm not going to let them get away with this, and I need your generous contributions right away to help ensure that I can keep battling the D.C. Swamp for justice**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=48f2b438a0&e=645b3b1338).

[**Contribute to my reelection campaign right away and show me that you're ready to stand up to these evil, corrupt Communist Democrats**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=113bcac30b&e=645b3b1338).

What's happening to the January 6 defendants amounts to human rights abuses -- committed by Democrat officials in a Democrat city, and far-left Justice Department appointed by Joe Biden.

When we tried to visit them Friday, we were blocked from entering the jail.

Then, they were put on "lockdown" all weekend as a punishment for our attempted visit.

_This is the stuff of Communist totalitarian regimes like China, not our Constitutional Republic_.

I am doing all that I can to help, but I need you to understand what's at risk, friend. The Establishment doesn't want us asking questions about the January 6 prisoners. That's why so few people in power are standing up.

It could cost me my political career, but I don't care. _I'm going to do what's right_.

[**But with your generous contributions to my reelection campaign today, you can tell the Establishment that you want to KEEP this America First warrior in Washington**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=9bf4ac3b54&e=645b3b1338).

[_**A contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250 or MORE to my reelection campaign right away, helps me fend off anything the Establishment D.C. Swamp might throw at me**_](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=c2a9eb20da&e=645b3b1338).

But we don't have much time, fellow Patriot.

Every day I battle for justice, America's political prisoners, held by Democrats, suffer more.

And every day I fight for them, the powers that be put a bigger target on my back.

_They want to take me out of the game permanently so I can't expose these injustices, and keep working to Drain the Swamp_.

[**I need you to show me that you have my back with your generous contributions to my reelection campaign today**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=7c756f7bb9&e=645b3b1338).

[**These are perilous times for our Republic, and just a small gift today goes a long way towards keeping me in your corner for the battle against the Globalists and Swamp Creatures**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=0cd7245c99&e=645b3b1338).
---
| Thank you in advance for your generous support.

For Freedom,
[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=87da971e0b&e=645b3b1338) Rep. Paul Gosar, DDS Arizona’s 4th District **P.S.** The mostly peaceful January 6 protestors are being held as political prisoners by Democrats in Washington.

[**Help me expose this injustice and keep fighting for their rights as Americans with a generous contribution to my reelection campaign today**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=cd37c91694&e=645b3b1338).

| My time working as President Trump's Secretary of State and CIA Director has put a target on my back. While a lot of people talk about what they WOULD do, _I 've actually gotten the job done and delivered BIG WINS for the American First agenda_ \- from freeing three captives in North Korea to ensuring Iranian terrorists like Qasem Soleimani never threaten our freedom again. That's made me some enemies, and they want me to fail.

I'm just going to be blunt: I need your help.

_**There is nothing the radical Left and their friends in the Fake News media love more than to mock and attack those of us close to President Trump.**_ That's why they are attacking me and wanting us to fail. If we fail, they can use it to say that our movement is dead!

I've had the privilege of serving America nearly my entire life - first as a young cadet at West Point, then patrolling the Iron Curtain in the Army and finally in my capacity as your 70th Secretary of State. I am proud to have devoted so much of my life to serving the country I love and championing our American values.

Now, I'm continuing that fight with a new organization committed not only to ensuring Republicans take back majorities in both the U.S. House of Representatives and the U.S. Senate, but also to gaining governorships and control of state legislatures all across America and to hold our leaders accountable for passing legislation that champions American values.

This is an incredibly important mission, and we cannot allow the Left to outraise us. **[That's why I'm asking you to make a donation of $100, $50 or $25 to help us send a clear message to the radical Left that the America First team isn't going away!](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=7e22694415ba461184d1fb099345ec83&_e=wHE6npWnVCiI5lPPkgxDkk3FkY0FPgUN_1eaTqt8lgr6aJpd3UYaX9l9hEB5USMEC6YZHpuCV9ijIoQOB0HsABGxtP72vdEO44fZOFpPjBaDpI16T8wExS3ZopMmQGqR9_aAFG6LOMJQ3xcSkrtWf0qiTcMGC_HXBH5oVXnMntg4RjZSYSaadfA9xs1Qm22YRJQhSkjs9pYLX-ZBrwdwIX45ov9vvzK1H9-7IEb5HrZRTQ13q5r7gOmeUUsERw9BMCP8u_peHXSfpDJmFjs7bmDcGiPDBBfbvXUWWbFqal62BElsYfx6GpUWzzqtpTHV1vtkpxhgDfpgIZj-wSVLpKZkFf67EGsRUJ1fJwlDVo0P2l7SLO6ANeD_30eiEM0eMM781peJZSY5KIC6Tknkz0fzaO56k07t5mX5F4jyQ8-Hq0WvM2SoaDxfRUc0QbpOIAJC2PaPR1vfKnpxEo6e-qrjMV3JGRE0T0lgL5FY4j01hmIp0w1mtEAshEqO8BkIJVtNsvRulsIrVGd9DMs65g%3D%3D "That’s why I’m humbly asking you to make a donation of $100, $50 or $25 to help us send a clear message to the radical Left that the America First team isn’t going away!")**

Hard working Americans shouldn’t need more than one job to put a roof over their heads, feed their families, or meet their basic needs. The time is past due for raising the national minimum wage -- | | | Virginia is in the process of gradually raising the minimum wage from $7.25 to $15 by 2026. In 2022, the Virginia state minimum wage will be $11 an hour. Elaine is fighting to implement a steady increase in the minimum wage at the federal level. | | \-- Team Elaine | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Action for the week of August 2nd: Stop mass amnesty tied to “infrastructure” bill!
body:
| |
---
This week, we want to the House to remove Nancy Pelosi as Speaker of the House, and we need to stop Republicans from supporting amnesty, in addition to other, local action items. Also, keep an eye out for any updates to the call to action involving the Democrats’ attempt to take over elections. The text for HR 4 will be out this week, likely on August 6th, timed with Voting Rights Act anniversary.

**Action items for this week include:**
* National: Remove Nancy Pelosi as Speaker of the House
* National: Stop amnesty in the “infrastructure” bill

* National: Call the Republican House leadership & tell them to remove Cheney & Kinzinger from the GOP Conference
* Local: Host or attend an “I do not consent” sign-waving event to protest medical mandates like masks and forced vaccines
* Local: Sign up to attend an August local government meeting

See below for details!

_Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
|
---
**NATIONAL
Call your Representative – it’s time to remove Nancy Pelosi as Speaker of the House
**
Republicans are going to make a “motion to vacate the chair,” which means to remove Nancy Pelosi as Speaker of the House. However, the Democrats will surely make a “motion to table” the motion to vacate the chair. Therefore, we want to urge members to **vote no on the motion to table the motion to vacate the chair.**

When you call, remind them that voting yes to table means they are voting to keep CRT in schools, for more lockdowns, more unAmerican mandates, more unsustainable spending, more illegal immigration, more crime... that’s what America gets if Nancy Pelosi gets to stay in the Speaker’s chair.

**Important Note:** You might be surprised to know that there is [growing discontent](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjE1LWQyZWRkNTFlMjJjNDQyYThiZGU1MmRiZWY2MGIzYmM0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9tb2JpbGUudHdpdHRlci5jb20vamVyb21lYXJtc3Ryb25nL3N0YXR1cy8xNDIwOTIzNDQ5NzQ1MjE1NDkzP21pZD00NDEzNCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=LeYkuTAu7ShqS4VeOvQ5uQ) among Democrat voters with their party’s commitment to forever lockdowns and racist CRT. While it is unlikely that any Democrat members will vote to remove Nancy Pelosi, it is very possible that with the earful Democrats begin to receive, even from Democrats, that they may push internally to back off of lockdowns, mandates, and CRT. It is definitely worth the try.
[FIND YOUR REPRESENTATIVE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjE1LWQyZWRkNTFlMjJjNDQyYThiZGU1MmRiZWY2MGIzYmM0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaG91c2UuZ292L3JlcHJlc2VudGF0aXZlcy9maW5kLXlvdXItcmVwcmVzZW50YXRpdmU_bWlkPTQ0MTM0JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=NC5mENfH7fhQuL5wQcbYkg)
|
---

Senate Democrats are planning an additional $3.5 trillion in spending after they vote on the infrastructure bill. If both these bills pass, we will be over $30 trillion in debt, and we will be crippling future generations and their ability to enjoy the lives they should.

Who could have predicted in January 2020 that in summer 2021, America would be slouching quickly into authoritarianism?

Covid was a dream for wanna-be tyrants, and unfortunately, there are too many Americans whose identities are either wrapped up in virtue signaling and feeling morally superior to others, or who have been manipulated with panic porn who are willing to go along with the tyranny.

Stand for our children and grandchildren. Please plan a sign-waving protest against these overbearing and unAmerican mandates in your local community.

Stand for our liberty. No more masks. No new lockdowns. No other medical mandates.
|
---
**LOCAL
Host or attend an “I do not consent” sign-waving protest**
Now is the time to stand for our children and grandchildren, to stand for small business owners, to stand for personal freedom.

**Please plan a sign-waving protest against these overbearing and unAmerican mandates in your local community.** [**Sign up here.**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjE1LWQyZWRkNTFlMjJjNDQyYThiZGU1MmRiZWY2MGIzYmM0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZG9ub3Rjb25zZW50Lz9taWQ9NDQxMzQmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=gorNvJCrmoRxnlDUoUlR7g)**** We created a mini-toolkit with sign suggestions and more to help you get this done.

Stand for our liberty. No more masks. No new lockdowns. No other medical mandates.
[CREATE YOUR SIGN WAVING EVENT](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjE1LWQyZWRkNTFlMjJjNDQyYThiZGU1MmRiZWY2MGIzYmM0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZG9ub3Rjb25zZW50Lz9taWQ9NDQxMzQmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=FF6_gyfOkppx_8rBtNlz7A)
|

They will often have names that include the words "county," "city," "township," "town," "district," etc.

[Take a look at our suggested items to research](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjE1LWQyZWRkNTFlMjJjNDQyYThiZGU1MmRiZWY2MGIzYmM0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvY2FsbHMtdG8tYWN0aW9uL3Jlc2VhcmNoaW5nLXlvdXItbG9jYWwtZ292ZXJubWVudC8_bWlkPTQ0MTM0JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=azZSPz24XaNLagtsdUU9GA) before you attend as well.

If you didn’t have a chance to attend a school board meeting in July, we will return to school boards in September, so take the opportunity to attend a different local government meeting in August.

**Remember, local governments are some of the entities that locked us down and mandated masks. They also have the ability to resist federal and state tyranny, and they’re some of the easiest government bodies to change or influence. It is crucial that you are plugged into your local government and know what they are doing.**
[LET US KNOW YOU’LL BE ATTENDING](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjE1LWQyZWRkNTFlMjJjNDQyYThiZGU1MmRiZWY2MGIzYmM0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvYXR0ZW5kLWxvY2FsLWdvdmVybm1lbnQvP21pZD00NDEzNCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=wfArBFVWUdhldAHUMJSpsg)

“Teachers unions long have traded on the assumption, held by parents who don’t pay that much attention, that the unions exist to promote the public interest – specifically, on a foundational premise that they ‘fight’ for ‘better education’ for the school-age children in their charge.

But the pandemic, and the teachers unions’ reactions to it, has revealed with shocking clarity that the teachers’ unions have been doing nothing of the sort. They haven’t been fighting for the students; heck, they haven’t even been fighting for all teachers. In reality, they have been, and are still, fighting to advance the interests of one relatively small clique of teachers who share doctrinaire beliefs about the proper response to the pandemic and, just as importantly, radical beliefs about America.”

[Read Jenny Beth Martin’s entire column about how teachers union malpractice here.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjE1LWQyZWRkNTFlMjJjNDQyYThiZGU1MmRiZWY2MGIzYmM0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTM%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnRpbWVzLmNvbS9uZXdzLzIwMjEvanVsLzIwL25ldmVyLWZvcmdldC10ZWFjaGVycy11bmlvbnMtZm91Z2h0LXRvLWtlZXAtc2Nob29sLz9taWQ9NDQxMzQmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=V497mxoK3pTWWrDHTN3tFg)

| | Beto O'Rourke went on Morning Joe and ripped into the inaction of Senate Democrats like Joe Manchin. They are ignorant of the full scale of our voting rights crisis and are refusing to take action on the filibuster. And, Peter, we're following Beto's lead on this one: **“Failure is not an option”** Beto understands that the filibuster is the only thing standing in the way of our Democratic majority passing historic voting rights legislation to end the GOP's march towards authoritarianism. But **make no mistake, the GOP is currently winning this fight.** Beto understands as well as anyone just how deeply doomed our democracy is if we don't pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Act and The For The People Act. He's witnessed first-hand how the fascist GOP will wield their power. This is essential: We're calling on our grassroots network to help us fight back and defend our democracy from the unprecedented assaults of the fascist GOP. That's why we're doing a full-court press pressure campaign in Joe Manchin's home state of West Virginia. We're pressuring him to do something \-- ANYTHING \-- to reform the filibuster and pass desperately needed voting rights protections. **[Peter, don't let our Joe Manchin pressure campaign fall apart when we need it most. The public outcry is starting to work, but he needs to feel sustained pressure at home. There's no time to wait: Will you rush a donation of $10, $25, $50, or whatever you can today to help us abolish the filibuster and show Beto we're behind him in his fight against voter suppression?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33471494/298985030/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20210801_GEN_FDR_K&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM3MDAyM2Y4LWExZjQtZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Sa3ZzHUO8qCClrHD7NM7f2oDHslLnIrasD--4s1Yr-U=)** | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Chief James Craig
subject: DEAD HEAT in Michigan...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chief James Craig for Governor Exploratory Committee • PO Box 15066 • Lansing, MI 48901 |
body:
**NEW POLL SHOWS CHIEF CRAIG IN A DEAD HEAT WITH GRETCHEN WHITMER** [**DONATE NOW
**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58064118:JRyAnxluN:m:1:3253819041:0B85DBFF237CD1D4EEF864F773F285B3:r) | |
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58064118:JRyAnxluN:m:1:3253819041:0B85DBFF237CD1D4EEF864F773F285B3:r)
|
---
Peter,

_**I 'm already TIED in the race with Gretchen Whitmer without a single campaign event, TV Ad, or even a formal announcement.**_

She's in trouble. And there's a good reason why.

More than half of Michiganders think the state is headed in the wrong direction, and 44% of them have a **very** unfavorable opinion of Governor Whitmer.

These numbers don't lie: **we have a unique opportunity to bring a change in leadership to Michigan.**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58064118:JRyAnxluN:m:1:3253819041:0B85DBFF237CD1D4EEF864F773F285B3:r)

**So why are Michiganders asking me, a long-time police officer, to challenge the governor? **

Let me tell you my story, and perhaps you'll understand why.

My 40+ years serving as a police officer taught me a lot about leadership - and a lot about the importance of law and order.

See, I grew up right here in Detroit during the '67 riots, watching tanks rolling down these streets. I remember snipers on the roofs.

I was with the Los Angeles Police Department when the Rodney King riots happened.

The police retreated, and let their city burn.

**Since I've been Chief of Police in Detroit, the police have never retreated. We are here to protect our citizens.**

But there's more to the "why?" than that.

When I came home to run the Detroit Police Department, it was in shambles. Morale, equipment - it all needed help. The response time to 911 calls was an hour, if you were lucky.

I started with Colony Arms - the epicenter of crime in Detroit. I made it an example. We mounted an assault. Twenty to thirty arrests later, we cleaned it up. It showed that the police force was back in Detroit and that we never again would allow criminals to rule our city. That is leading from the front.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58064118:JRyAnxluN:m:1:3253819041:0B85DBFF237CD1D4EEF864F773F285B3:r)

Then, I went into the city and met with every group I could find. Developed trust, showed what leadership could do.

So, when the unfortunate situation happened with George Floyd, and outsiders came here to try and burn us down, _**Detroit did not burn.**_

Leadership - real leadership - matters.

Living within the rules we set for others, instead of within some special rules for the elite.

No "rules for thee, not for me!"

Michigan has had enough of that. There are no kings and queens in America. Leading from the front. Why don't politicians get that?

Bringing our state back from the front. That's leadership.

I don't see much of that out there.

**So, I'm opening an exploratory committee to help me think about a run for Governor of Michigan. **

I believe in leading from the front - and I think you do too, Peter. That's why I'm inviting you to be a Lead From the Front donor. **[Contribute today and you will be a part of our team from Day 1.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58064118:JRyAnxluN:m:1:3253819041:0B85DBFF237CD1D4EEF864F773F285B3:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58064118:JRyAnxluN:m:1:3253819041:0B85DBFF237CD1D4EEF864F773F285B3:r)

[** LEAD FROM THE FRONT WITH CHIEF CRAIG**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58064118:JRyAnxluN:m:1:3253819041:0B85DBFF237CD1D4EEF864F773F285B3:r)
Sometimes people are surprised to hear that I'm a Republican.

I grew up a Democrat. But then I watched as Democrats allowed our cities to riot, to burn, and to fail. I watched as they pushed handouts that increase dependency on the government for political gain.

**And what the Democratic Party stands for today - liberal wokeism and a perpetual victimhood mentality - those are NOT my values.**

_**And I'm pretty sure you can guess MY position on "Defund the Police!"**_

I grew up in the church. I was taught to respect my elders, the importance of self-reliance, and the value of hard work. I read the writings of great Americans like Abraham Lincoln, Frederick Douglass, Booker T. Washington and Sojourner Truth.

Looking back on it, my values were always Republican values.

When I was Chief of Police, I didn't broadcast my personal political affiliation. But the truth is, I've been a Republican for a long time.

**And I voted for President Trump in both elections - proudly.**

Michigan Republicans need a candidate that can bring our message into areas that aren't traditionally Republican voters.

And all of Michigan needs a governor that leads from the front, rather than ruling us like a queen.

**Lead from the front. Keep our people safe. Solve problems. That's what Michigan needs. Will you join me?**
**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**
[**JOIN CHIEF CRAIG NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58064118:JRyAnxluN:m:1:3253819041:0B85DBFF237CD1D4EEF864F773F285B3:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58064119:JRyAnxluN:m:1:3253819041:0B85DBFF237CD1D4EEF864F773F285B3:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58064120:JRyAnxluN:m:1:3253819041:0B85DBFF237CD1D4EEF864F773F285B3:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58064121:JRyAnxluN:m:1:3253819041:0B85DBFF237CD1D4EEF864F773F285B3:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58064122:JRyAnxluN:m:1:3253819041:0B85DBFF237CD1D4EEF864F773F285B3:r)
_**If you've saved payment information with Revv, your donation will go through automatically.**_

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58064118:JRyAnxluN:m:1:3253819041:0B85DBFF237CD1D4EEF864F773F285B3:r)

Chief James Craig

Former Detroit Police Chief

P.S. I'm not a politician, I'm a police officer. I'm starting this process from scratch. Any amount you can donate to our team today would be much appreciated: **[https://secure.winred.com/james-craig-for-governor-exploratory-committee/action-2662599](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58064118:JRyAnxluN:m:1:3253819041:0B85DBFF237CD1D4EEF864F773F285B3:r)**

| My time working as President Trump's Secretary of State and CIA Director has put a target on my back. While a lot of people talk about what they WOULD do, _I 've actually gotten the job done and delivered BIG WINS for the American First agenda_ \- from freeing three captives in North Korea to ensuring Iranian terrorists like Qasem Soleimani never threaten our freedom again. That's made me some enemies, and they want me to fail.

I'm just going to be blunt: I need your help.

_**There is nothing the radical Left and their friends in the Fake News media love more than to mock and attack those of us close to President Trump.**_ That's why they are attacking me and wanting us to fail. If we fail, they can use it to say that our movement is dead!

---

I've had the privilege of serving America nearly my entire life - first as a young cadet at West Point, then patrolling the Iron Curtain in the Army and finally in my capacity as your 70th Secretary of State. I am proud to have devoted so much of my life to serving the country I love and championing our American values.

Now, I'm continuing that fight with a new organization committed not only to ensuring Republicans take back majorities in both the U.S. House of Representatives and the U.S. Senate, but also to gaining governorships and control of state legislatures all across America and to hold our leaders accountable for passing legislation that champions American values.

This is an incredibly important mission, and we cannot allow the Left to outraise us. **[That's why I'm asking you to make a donation of $100, $50 or $25 to help us send a clear message to the radical Left that the America First team isn't going away!](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9a739f10450f44dca5140caa76bea1f0&_e=Gl6ThyjQvcvKsBMXm3X7b1yRXdDQF1ZZPXpbJVM3r3giMtNteBEk7g0haOlEde0IQu-H3_zJAqP94dp_FeIl0-K13Hb5fH5gksV4f_gUFq1EVzxV-I2neR6aAl_dsYjXw0vyYyqFQBkVAQbdpBzMhsyKv4-b-9bTesmHPf7mgz6NnxtI0WeW3osUx5eFjI5CohGZwm5FFmpSEeqjsdU1BssasGJoDl-Zaamu3_tOCfqkyTAT-VRucqCORXz-9YLQQ7zNPZC10EJmkYxtZbgQdQQf2gfHd22Xl5Khij_WottVtlQrMoSirV8tMoWVtVcayK54XcaAzUHA7H1z4JIwcNPn9eFA7oUAfgZ9ZDt71zKAF3zroGxmJVA9OBB5urtEPBemoMKtH2YzxQxdfD0ejEyfalJ-1rdtXlQNf_gN-47E1xhKqxGRDxOWnsAMWstPaZi8S48QPbiFgOdjFhtaNFIovLlNg-moRpbFDxSRmJuhjfONmxRRbmt9CQ3xK2BzyaV-OMHrg7cNCeeW5TL7rQ%3D%3D "That’s why I’m humbly asking you to make a donation of $100, $50 or $25 to help us send a clear message to the radical Left that the America First team isn’t going away!")**

The radical Left is watching because they want us to fail, so I am incredibly grateful for whatever you can give to help us outraise the Democrats!

Never Give An Inch,

clean_body: | | | | | | My time working as President Trump's Secretary of State and CIA Director has put a target on my back. While a lot of people talk about what they WOULD do, I 've actually gotten the job done and delivered BIG WINS for the American First agenda \- from freeing three captives in North Korea to ensuring Iranian terrorists like Qasem Soleimani never threaten our freedom again. That's made me some enemies, and they want me to fail. I'm just going to be blunt: I need your help. There is nothing the radical Left and their friends in the Fake News media love more than to mock and attack those of us close to President Trump. That's why they are attacking me and wanting us to fail. If we fail, they can use it to say that our movement is dead! | I've had the privilege of serving America nearly my entire life - first as a young cadet at West Point, then patrolling the Iron Curtain in the Army and finally in my capacity as your 70th Secretary of State. I am proud to have devoted so much of my life to serving the country I love and championing our American values. Now, I'm continuing that fight with a new organization committed not only to ensuring Republicans take back majorities in both the U.S. House of Representatives and the U.S. Senate, but also to gaining governorships and control of state legislatures all across America and to hold our leaders accountable for passing legislation that champions American values. This is an incredibly important mission, and we cannot allow the Left to outraise us. "That’s why I’m humbly asking you to make a donation of $100, $50 or $25 to help us send a clear message to the radical Left that the America First team isn’t going away!" The radical Left is watching because they want us to fail, so I am incredibly grateful for whatever you can give to help us outraise the Democrats! subject: Have you heard?
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NTWfRm2lxk8Y9vUBxo-AY2BuFp5-0z37-aQkvfisIXUqyPqIUGbCO6EC9b2cTfv8upeVmXZ1bobaXw84b3uvRMZ840vKIWg5re58ieUwTj5z0DsCCYuieNlqtCpllxB0R0KQ1apDG08u356SSl-DQkwzkXdasxBKHEJswyIA0OYXW4T9-NL_kLzkVNHHI-nIKwENTazxTPO0wJJcT0hQTmxEVgc5MhkQJiJ5Pb0W1fBISHCjks6pZJw5sjB2HvnfxD-MC3h9aVMepvGPJENK04f6IGlM_u8gkvfo86Yb8JzmwG2lmUw62dDvROSfcYnQMb_WZIpdqPk=&c=nBxM-m7YA4ogLP8FlaobUBKvDStdRhwBmYRF-Wd7w9uEVbRYtbH2rQ==&ch=jFC-DOSeJhm5PtqOpM3W5mKu3p2CxieDKeatRsvdVenmW3g7ecr-1g==)

| Peter -
You need to hear this.
News just broke that Joe Biden let 210,000 illegal immigrants into our country last month at the southern border. That's the highest monthly total in more than 20 years.
Here's Biden's border crisis by the numbers:
❌ AT LEAST 50,000 illegal immigrants released into our communities
❌ 210,000 caught at our border just last month
❌ 1 MILLION caught so far this year
This is out of control.

| While Biden is forcing you to wear a mask and threatening to lock you in your homes because of COVID, he's left the door wide-open to COVID infected illegal immigrants.
Now we know that illegal immigrants are infecting our American communities in Texas, where hospital beds are filling up because of Biden's open border policies.
---
| | | [SIGN THE PETITION. TELL BIDEN TO CLOSE THE BORDER.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NTWfRm2lxk8Y9vUBxo-AY2BuFp5-0z37-aQkvfisIXUqyPqIUGbCO6EC9b2cTfv8FPCSiUu460Jio4YumWVpC-B4sP2VDN5-MeH2OPT6pfIr3wJ-UftT4gGJZ23N-4YdYDl4RQUrmIuGP0Ww-Q81uHr3FqsXV3xIsjLIPw8Wpu9DWy96Njeuw5k0C9fE5Om8I5qIGOe0PFv5CRxEk6g0KSoTXQUd661N_jAYPlX-yth6thqMyNlB6kTIZoHNnyBwa8D0_etRGoAT_j6ssIIE-QNvF-AyP52E6-hznt2Lzt2vfMfYXf4NWL3eDzjr7gO8Ja5Zp7yvJTlZalwtinHI4KXPkBpGwsLFvn5aqgr4ob9Hs4GoD9rKmg==&c=nBxM-m7YA4ogLP8FlaobUBKvDStdRhwBmYRF-Wd7w9uEVbRYtbH2rQ==&ch=jFC-DOSeJhm5PtqOpM3W5mKu3p2CxieDKeatRsvdVenmW3g7ecr-1g==)

| Maybe the CDC should tell Biden to close the southern border. But they won't.
Joe, Kamala, and Nancy have DELIBERATELY encouraged illegal immigration. Why? Because they want their votes. It's all about politics.

name: filibuster news (via info@unitedemocrats.org)
subject: re: Republican Leader Mitch McConnell
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
| **We’ll be blunt, Peter:** To curb Republican voter suppression and pass President Biden’s historic agenda, **we need to get rid of the filibuster.**

**But Republicans aren’t backing down** \-- Republican Leader Mitch McConnell said he would go ‘scorched earth’ if the Senate ends the filibuster.

So you can either do _nothing_ as McConnell’s Republicans tarnish President Biden’s good name and threaten our Democracy.

| **Text UNITE to 25002 to receive special text message updates from our campaign!**

**[Peter, to defeat Republican voter suppression, we need to stand together and DEMAND that our Senate end the filibuster. If you agree, I’m counting on 10,000 supporters to sign on now »](https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/end-citizens-united-petition/?source=2021FilibusterReform_Arballo&referrer=group-phil-arballo-for-congress&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_arballo_q32021_ja?refcode=PAFC_20210803_EMJA_E1_T0_AC)** 10,000 DEMOCRATS NEEDED: | [TELL THE SENATE TO TANK THE FILIBUSTER »](https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/end-citizens-united-petition/?source=2021FilibusterReform_Arballo&referrer=group-phil-arballo-for-congress&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_arballo_q32021_ja?refcode=PAFC_20210803_EMJA_E1_T0_AC)
---
Let’s be clear, Peter: The filibuster is an archaic tool segregationists tried to weaponize to block Civil Rights legislation.

And now, Republicans are using the filibuster to deny common-sense legislation and suppress voting rights for historically disenfranchised groups.

**Right now, the Senate has a historic opportunity to band together and END the filibuster.**

But to do it, we need to keep the spotlight on this important issue and build up an overwhelming grassroot base of supporters ready to tank the filibuster.

**[So I need your support and signature on our petition to tank the filibuster once and for all. Please add your name immediately to this massive movement-building petition. »](https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/end-citizens-united-petition/?source=2021FilibusterReform_Arballo&referrer=group-phil-arballo-for-congress&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_arballo_q32021_ja?refcode=PAFC_20210803_EMJA_E1_T0_AC)**
[_10,000 DEMOCRATS NEEDED:_ SIGN ON NOW »](https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/end-citizens-united-petition/?source=2021FilibusterReform_Arballo&referrer=group-phil-arballo-for-congress&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_arballo_q32021_ja?refcode=PAFC_20210803_EMJA_E1_T0_AC)
---
Thank you,

_\-- Phil_

subject: we showed that collective action works

body:
I was so proud to join my friend Cori Bush on the steps of the Capitol this weekend to advocate for the urgent and necessary extension of the eviction moratorium.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33474254/298993603/-182076786?refcode=BLU-SJC-20210803-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGI4NmE3Mi1hY2Y0LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q2s816Y9zCCqbNOrnFKjaxG3QJPtqrX4y6wHJ2RcHCo=)
---
| Last Friday, I planned to fly home from Washington, DC to spend time with my constituents back in San Diego for the month of August. But when I saw that we would be recessing before extending the eviction moratorium, I canceled my flight home in hopes of staying in session to work on solving this critical issue. The expiration of the federal eviction moratorium was projected to leave over 3.6 million households across the nation unhoused over the next two months.

I was so proud to join my friend Cori Bush on the steps of the Capitol this weekend to advocate for the urgent and necessary extension of the eviction moratorium. Today, we got word that President Biden will be replacing the expired moratorium with a new moratorium that will cover 90% of the United States’ population. I am thrilled to see real results from my colleagues and I applying pressure to the Administration.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33474255/298993604/-182076786?refcode=BLU-SJC-20210803-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGI4NmE3Mi1hY2Y0LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q2s816Y9zCCqbNOrnFKjaxG3QJPtqrX4y6wHJ2RcHCo=)

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Protections expired
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Without immediate action, millions of people are going to be kicked out of their homes during a pandemic.
#
Peter,
If we allow the end of the eviction moratorium to go unaddressed, millions of families will be evicted at a time in which more than 11.4 million people are struggling to pay their rent.
That’s why I’m urging the White House to immediately reinstate the moratorium and halt all evictions. Then, we need to do significantly more to make housing affordable for all. Here’s the bottom line: Democrats need to be the party that keeps people in their homes.
[**Fuel our urgent fight to get the White House to take action today by chipping in $3. My campaign runs on grassroots donations, not PAC donations from the corporate landlords trying to evict working families during a pandemic.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210803?refcode=em20210803-513&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&refcode2=513_420207_hCNK2S&akid=513%2E420207%2EhCNK2S)
**[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210803?refcode=em20210803-513&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=513_420207_hCNK2S&akid=513%2E420207%2EhCNK2S)**
Even before the pandemic, more than 580,000 people were experiencing homelessness on any given night. On top of that, 10.5 million households were paying more than 50 percent of their income on rent — putting them on the edge of being evicted too. And right now, more than 6.5 million renter households remain behind on their rent.
Without immediate action by the White House, millions of people are going to be kicked out of their homes. We can’t let that happen. The White House can and must act now.
[**It is urgent that we continue our push to reinstate eviction protections and guarantee housing as a human right. Chip in $3 to support my push for action from the White House.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210803?refcode=em20210803-513&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=513_420207_hCNK2S&akid=513%2E420207%2EhCNK2S)
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210803-513-footer&t=22&refcode2=513_420207_hCNK2S&akid=513%2E420207%2EhCNK2S)**
---

name: Cicely Davis
subject: I’m going to Beat Ilhan Omar
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CICELY DAVIS FOR CONGRESS
body:
Ilhan Omar has been allowed to spread hate and push radical politics to every corner of this nation. | [](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=23c5990eb73748968777074b50281a1d&_e=xK8oNjWiHst7LAPJgunP_TAB_qaqkVtAcfYiTbVjxPjffQuO9ZpyYchx1nGb0k6YP0JkNDXcnjVRV7vhdcGO-h-OMgTnMmJk41UkwoWcz_hIGuJTS5WhJTVqkIK-HxlD07znfwNYdMXx3pHYloEyZ8nvUXTmiis0J_ManydRXgUHe41GSbtKQRx5aU2VjGdWHI7CgHulz2sr1R23eX96_h7zM8AvqYNC1oFMmSW21JUNXnFMzWag2UxstE2SiiZzUQySO1__9Oqkk7h7iBTSfKOIBikQvAHON7X2uOxpoL8se-shLvYUpgwY9yGZpmFPcFKTK9x9X_YitFm6CalUomBfDLbzYQOJ8ZSi_u19TCrYDtZZ8Lr5l3-173-mDiyv1ZW6XJ4sdjmT3oSqfQiaPA%3D%3D)

---

Peter,

I’m running for Congress against Squad Member Ilhan Omar because it’s time for my community, my state, and our nation to get back to what made us great to begin with: **hard work and the American Dream.**

My name is Cicely Davis, and I’m fighting to bring back the Star of the North. I grew up in Minneapolis, and I remember when my city was beautiful and thriving, but thanks to Ilhan Omar and her Radical friends I barely recognize my home.

If you’re familiar with Minnesota, then you know Democrats in my state have destroyed our economy, brought violence to our streets, and exploited racial divisions to gain power. **I’m here to tell you that we can put that reign to an end.**

[** STAND WITH CICELY **](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=23c5990eb73748968777074b50281a1d&_e=xK8oNjWiHst7LAPJgunP_TAB_qaqkVtAcfYiTbVjxPjffQuO9ZpyYchx1nGb0k6YP0JkNDXcnjVRV7vhdcGO-h-OMgTnMmJk41UkwoWcz_hIGuJTS5WhJTVqkIK-HxlD07znfwNYdMXx3pHYloEyZ8nvUXTmiis0J_ManydRXgUHe41GSbtKQRx5aU2VjGdWSYpf-AN3nZcs0uOtUTxvdLqbGy6VIssfnn3TdXFSdcUYP8ExI8dCiIUXi-6CUY9xJ3MNY_JZyyEY2MnUCSNiL7QF1ix3Fzx0InPyngMGOn1ZuOO-51zYBVHpH9BjVPD6KKXB7O6A6dZZlEE_qchq7lxaNeYNrcPIuZbdAsOlSX1pb0JNY-N9M1lcUbFo_QaYXAoiyoURnODTBJW8mu4X3w%3D%3D)
For too long Ilhan Omar has been allowed to spread hate and push radical politics to every corner of this nation. **She pressed my city of Minneapolis to defund the police,** **now it’s a breeding ground for crime where murders alone have increased 49% since last year.**

Omar has praised BLM while they set fire to our communities, she spends every waking moment bashing the very country that welcomed her, and her family with open arms and does so while enjoying more freedoms than any other nation in this world provides.

**ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. How long can we stand by and let Omar and the Democrats slowly tear our nation apart from the inside out?** [**If you’ve had enough, then it’s time to take a stand.**](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=23c5990eb73748968777074b50281a1d&_e=xK8oNjWiHst7LAPJgunP_TAB_qaqkVtAcfYiTbVjxPjffQuO9ZpyYchx1nGb0k6YP0JkNDXcnjVRV7vhdcGO-h-OMgTnMmJk41UkwoWcz_hIGuJTS5WhJTVqkIK-HxlD07znfwNYdMXx3pHYloEyZ8nvUXTmiis0J_ManydRXgUHe41GSbtKQRx5aU2VjGdWpg-DoP8xu-ETntf7Glp7l-erqfIuCxIgQkKVJ8iKcUhPBp2FIyELA_fDVB09RgRJ87bOPnGa5KfEcSi_ujWtdBTl06oTry4NsMiet4bhevVTyWWMGQ9zlr2u6bXJ4V-CQsIHnclvLsotzdu941_VFDdbjo39npu6woC9lFTQbqTSAvQnZxFmOuQx5RlXXRuSGfwwEY5FnooIYmPqJmwWKA%3D%3D)

[**Peter, will you help me kick off my campaign by sending $10, $25, $50, $100 or more?**](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=23c5990eb73748968777074b50281a1d&_e=xK8oNjWiHst7LAPJgunP_TAB_qaqkVtAcfYiTbVjxPjffQuO9ZpyYchx1nGb0k6YP0JkNDXcnjVRV7vhdcGO-h-OMgTnMmJk41UkwoWcz_hIGuJTS5WhJTVqkIK-HxlD07znfwNYdMXx3pHYloEyZ8nvUXTmiis0J_ManydRXgUHe41GSbtKQRx5aU2VjGdWRWPbN_HJ3JniayUTi2oAQyS3E72Gt-xfKtWXVNrsa7AQL75rwJa1zvDBTh59M5Le_goPuvZeMwQ-GAQZIX2gt1FDHuU_6EwJek-wFGCOaea6EkE3WPAwwJZCZ6yR5nMqxe0NtcbV38gQQ62l16qAHPAinQzPvusMPc4LfgXrWv1I1SqF_hL20Q4L80_9NRGBVjqN7JI9-qqCSj5h5AyoTw%3D%3D)

[** STAND WITH CICELY **](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=23c5990eb73748968777074b50281a1d&_e=xK8oNjWiHst7LAPJgunP_TAB_qaqkVtAcfYiTbVjxPjffQuO9ZpyYchx1nGb0k6YP0JkNDXcnjVRV7vhdcGO-h-OMgTnMmJk41UkwoWcz_hIGuJTS5WhJTVqkIK-HxlD07znfwNYdMXx3pHYloEyZ8nvUXTmiis0J_ManydRXgUHe41GSbtKQRx5aU2VjGdW-aSiflVF_BNomQFdYMtl0N_6-G0fpdyGzp9X56XUwzhcHJavsLmBArGcpyJRKa4fKrfX4Uht4R_woUTdrJkxODnEnxpYvRQFYdpH138F6FB8MSVdfZaEM41ixN5tZlsD1YWn2qmrRAhXrFoTnZe-t6MxA6Xz91Vgp6vSmjyow9Nh9MteHZ-uykcY8ppDxEDgOSOKf5C-yov_fMJ1N5Ha3Q%3D%3D)
I refuse to sit by as Omar and the Democrats continue on this path of destructiveness. If you want to restore our nation then we need to take action now, even if it means reclaiming one state, one city, or even one community at time.

**I need your help to restore what made our nation so great to begin with, and it starts with places like Minneapolis. clean_body: Ilhan Omar has been allowed to spread hate and push radical politics to every corner of this nation. | Peter, I’m running for Congress against Squad Member Ilhan Omar because it’s time for my community, my state, and our nation to get back to what made us great to begin with: hard work and the American Dream. My name is Cicely Davis, and I’m fighting to bring back the Star of the North. I grew up in Minneapolis, and I remember when my city was beautiful and thriving, but thanks to Ilhan Omar and her Radical friends I barely recognize my home. If you’re familiar with Minnesota, then you know Democrats in my state have destroyed our economy, brought violence to our streets, and exploited racial divisions to gain power. I’m here to tell you that we can put that reign to an end. For too long Ilhan Omar has been allowed to spread hate and push radical politics to every corner of this nation. She pressed my city of Minneapolis to defund the police, now it’s a breeding ground for crime where murders alone have increased 49% since last year. Omar has praised BLM while they set fire to our communities, she spends every waking moment bashing the very country that welcomed her, and her family with open arms and does so while enjoying more freedoms than any other nation in this world provides. ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. How long can we stand by and let Omar and the Democrats slowly tear our nation apart from the inside out? I refuse to sit by as Omar and the Democrats continue on this path of destructiveness. If you want to restore our nation then we need to take action now, even if it means reclaiming one state, one city, or even one community at time. I need your help to restore what made our nation so great to begin with, and it starts with places like Minneapolis. This is your chance to make a real difference, For America, Cicely Davis | | PAID FOR BY CICELY DAVIS FOR CONGRESS FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

body:
Friends: This is urgent. St. Pete polls just released new data that shows us ahead of Ron DeSantis among independent voters. It also shows DeSantis’ approval rating underwater.

This is huge, team, and it shows we can win this race. Click here to RUSH $20 or whatever you can spare to help build on this momentum. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nikki-august-poll]

According to the poll, Independent voters disapprove of DeSantis by a more than 10 point margin! It’s clear that swing voters have noticed that DeSantis has failed us at every turn--especially during the COVID-19 crisis.

Here’s the bottom line: this is big news, and we can win this race.

Team, please click here to chip in now to help us keep the pressure on DeSantis and win this race. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nikki-august-poll]

When I launched this campaign, I said people would underestimate us. Our strategy to prove them wrong and defeat Ron DeSantis is already making a difference. But we can’t let up.

We need to continue working hard to show all Floridians--Democrats, Republicans, and Independents--that DeSantis has failed to lead, and it’s time for something new.

Your support is making a real difference. It’s clear that with your help, we can win this race. Please click here to rush a contribution and help us build on this momentum. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nikki-august-poll]

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: re: Weed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
John has proven that he is not afraid to stand on the right side of history, even when it has meant standing there alone.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210803-2197-header&t=1&akid=2197%2E434096%2EZUvQjE)
Peter, in a minute, I'm going to ask you to [** _please contribute your very first $5 donation to help flip this seat and send John Fetterman to the U.S. Senate._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/25939?refcode=em20210803-2197&t=2&akid=2197%2E434096%2EZUvQjE)
Before I do, I want to share one of the main reasons why I'm proud to serve as John's Political Director: **His long-standing commitment to working toward ending the racist War on Drugs, and his ongoing fight for marijuana justice + second chances.**
I'll start at the beginning. Back in 2016, other Democrats running for Senate in PA were afraid to go bold on the issue of legal weed. _Not John._ He was a lone voice for full legalization of marijuana, regardless of any political consequences.
Then, in 2018, John *again* chose to make legal weed a key campaign priority in his race for Lt. Governor — something that most other Democrats shy away from to this day. (BTW, he and Governor Wolf went on earn the highest number of votes ever won as a ticket in a Pennsylvania gubernatorial election.)
In 2020, John pressured fellow Democrats nationwide to join his fight for full-on legalization. He penned a blazing op-ed in _The Washington Post,_ and let's just say he didn't mince words...
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/25939?refcode=em20210803-2197&t=3&akid=2197%2E434096%2EZUvQjE)
Here's the big picture, Peter: **John has proven that he is not afraid to stand on the right side of history when it comes to legalizing weed, expunging marijuana records, and releasing all those incarcerated for the plant — even when it has meant standing there alone.**
In his current role as Lt. Governor, John has helped establish an expedited review process for pardons for low-level cannabis charges. _These pardons have helped scores of deserving Pennsylvanians get their lives back after unjust, racist, and inhumane drug policies ripped them away._
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/25939?refcode=em20210803-2197&t=4&akid=2197%2E434096%2EZUvQjE)
John hasn't had to "evolve" on his core issues like some other politicians have. Because where he stands today is where he's always stood. [** _If that's the kind of leader you want fighting for you, will you chip your first $5 to help elect John to the U.S. Senate, where he'll be one of the loudest voices for legal weed + marijuana justice? I wouldn't ask if it weren't so important._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/25939?refcode=em20210803-2197&t=5&akid=2197%2E434096%2EZUvQjE)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/25939?refcode=em20210803-2197&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=2197%2E434096%2EZUvQjE)**
Thank you so much for your support,
Celeste
Celeste Trusty
Political Director
John Fetterman for U.S. Senate
P.S. Peter, when people ask me why I'm proud to be in John Fetterman's corner, I tell them this: **John has never shied away from the kinds of bold policies that have the power to reimagine what justice looks like in Pennsylvania and our entire country.** But sending him to the Senate and flipping this seat blue can only happen with enough people chipping in whatever and whenever they can. [** _If that's you today, please consider sending $5 our way so we can keep up the fight to elect John._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/25939?refcode=em20210803-2197&t=25&akid=2197%2E434096%2EZUvQjE)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210803-2197-footer&t=26&refcode2=2197_434096_ZUvQjE&akid=2197%2E434096%2EZUvQjE)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=27&akid=2197%2E434096%2EZUvQjE)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=2197%2E434096%2EZUvQjE)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Joe Mantegna
subject: We have a responsibility to honor their valor
body:
Hi friend, this is Joe Mantegna. You might know me from movies or TV as Joey Zasa in _The_ _Godfather_ , the voice of Fat Tony in _The Simpsons_ , or Special Agent David Rossi in the CBS series _Criminal Minds._ But what you may not know about me is that off-screen, I try to spend time raising awareness and appreciation for those who risked their lives so that we can live in freedom. [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=827afd0188924d8d96ad2961f33b9b88&_e=ehSSKFLOsHPrzenEcCT-aMgFMHSnpJLcYUVSVNl4HULw2B1mmQmPyMtH9SA9bwSz_19xD-axfHkTDD8vXKruB7Kdh0fTXhblhkV-watwg0NZC4sSO08JEnb5wqdkZaswoEYobPyIyPPbzkOgqN8uszafhF5xLtIv1HFxSV52w_4Sm4NMF7Dax_W7o8iOC7G3ioAzPL3H-r-rx87r1RX5iKnDaazRGtwxOzmBGmsULetdtmVjGjp7it_SoNgZOQ4z11bKS5TMm-juxGH6oJDoLzNdK46GvopztKu97UPxSCzmEPT9rVwJtU8lG9yA6hJ9eklitoNCRINVs_w8W7IdXdx6d-H7tL-XYYCblzEhsDsTfJGWTz4bymboGmoPniunp8a1IiSKAIxO3CPWg-b0AVKvlhzCaEVe37fvTxZMo-4ImtZXhmW_mRWKlM6dkiHS) You see, out of the millions of brave men and women who served in World War II, Korea, and Vietnam, only about 6% are still with us today. _Most of the World War II veterans still alive are nearing or past 100 years old... most of our Korean War veterans are in their 90s... and most of our Vietnam veterans are in their 70s and 80s._ Sadly, with hundreds of these heroes passing away every day, time is short to preserve their first-hand lessons and experiences from which future generations can learn. That’s why today, I’m asking fellow patriotic Americans like yourself to help my friends at the American Veterans Center with a special, time-sensitive project –[ **to record the personal stories of our heroic veterans from our World War II generation before it’s too late.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=827afd0188924d8d96ad2961f33b9b88&_e=ehSSKFLOsHPrzenEcCT-aMgFMHSnpJLcYUVSVNl4HULw2B1mmQmPyMtH9SA9bwSz_19xD-axfHkTDD8vXKruB7Kdh0fTXhblhkV-watwg0NZC4sSO08JEnb5wqdkZaswoEYobPyIyPPbzkOgqN8uszafhF5xLtIv1HFxSV52w_4Sm4NMF7Dax_W7o8iOC7G3ioAzPL3H-r-rx87r1RX5iKnDaazRGtwxOzmBGmsULetIbgFvn1kS0ELlQ-NJAtN27eP_jRqApoO6sEb_G2KtRX5RuIe35ix2jKTihi1RPzBbMyAw9QjxsWPSndFmGvmuUTGYCP9Eedq8TRfaqYa34v9Ai9VsP0pdplrG_HGIAjydyE9GbFqNxK6WhehDgbC-GgGJeBmfE0XBXUDVAcPuGTqhrHgFa0uHEhYEbhW_kJAQN3h7Oq5QwYVgOE7I5hBP) _You and I understand that freedom is not free and that its price is the blood and sacrifice of generations willing to stand and serve._ **I learned those lessons from my Uncle Willie who served in General Patton’s Third Army in World War II** – _he even earned a Purple Heart for the injuries he sustained in the Battle of the Bulge._ But what I didn’t realize until later in life is that the war stories he told me weren’t just about him... They were about honoring and remembering his brothers in arms who never made it back home... the ones who never got a chance to re-start their lives like he did. I knew then that whatever I chose to do in life was because of their valor – _and I knew that I had a responsibility to honor that valor._ So, almost fifteen years ago when I met Jim Roberts – President of the American Veterans Center – I was immediately glad to offer any help I could to help honor our veterans and military heroes. You see, the American Veterans Center (or AVC) understands better than most what it means to truly honor veterans, like my Uncle Willie, and remember those who made the ultimate sacrifice in service to our country. That’s why they send camera crews around the country to visit our aging veterans from World War II, Korea, and Vietnam, professionally filming their personal memories of service and sacrifice, and capturing their invaluable contribution to American history. After they finish recording one of these “Oral Histories”, they post it on their YouTube page for millions of Americans to watch. Each is also donated to the Library of Congress’ Veterans History Project for preservation and use by future researchers, and are made available on request to museums and documentary films. If you’ve ever watched one of AVC’s Oral Histories, you’ll know that they are extensive, high-quality interviews where our veterans have as much time as they need to tell every detail of their remarkable service. And as a T.V. and film producer myself, I can tell you firsthand that these Oral Histories are simply breath-taking. With the pandemic waning, the AVC is working to double-down on its effort to capture the remaining stories of our World War II heroes. Right now, the AVC has identified more than 200 stories to film as soon as possible, which include:
* **The 442nd Regimental Combat Team** – Veterans of the legendary all-Japanese American unit that would become the most decorated unit in American military history for its size and length of service, being awarded eight Presidential Unit Citations, 21 Medals of Honor, and more than 4,000 Purple Hearts.
* **The Ritchie Boys** – A special unit comprised largely of Jewish immigrants and refugees from Germany and Austria, trained in counterintelligence and deployed back to Europe with the United States Army to help defeat Hitler.
* **Royce Williams** – The top scoring carrier-based naval aviator and top scoring naval aviator in a Navy jet in the Korean War and the only fighter pilot to shoot down four Soviet MIG-15s in one fight.
* **Rosie the Riveters** – The American women on the home front who worked to build the planes, tanks, and ships for our boys fighting off on the front lines.

These are just a few of the amazing stories they have lined up to record before it’s too late. But there is one challenge... In order to properly capture an Oral History – from identifying videographers to travel to equipment - it costs the American Veterans Center around $2,000. As a non-profit organization, the AVC relies almost entirely on generous Americans like you to preserve and honor the sacrifices of America’s greatest heroes. [**So, will you help my friends at the AVC record the Oral Histories of as many living WWII veterans as possible with a generous, tax-deductible contribution of $15, $35, $50 or more today?**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=827afd0188924d8d96ad2961f33b9b88&_e=ehSSKFLOsHPrzenEcCT-aMgFMHSnpJLcYUVSVNl4HULw2B1mmQmPyMtH9SA9bwSz_19xD-axfHkTDD8vXKruB7Kdh0fTXhblhkV-watwg0NZC4sSO08JEnb5wqdkZaswoEYobPyIyPPbzkOgqN8uszafhF5xLtIv1HFxSV52w_4Sm4NMF7Dax_W7o8iOC7G3ioAzPL3H-r-rx87r1RX5iKnDaazRGtwxOzmBGmsULevufiChjLo8aSkWSrAd_5fzscTG4IFKMqPikY5OuLk5XoVW7g8E3zPF3FmzKx2sJIUbCDQkULw47mp8GK03jjroYBSZbNTbtgH2QWi8C_H_2V9J8XGwHW71uugJ_jpPqJk0qG4E_nQFlnw-NZHJzNH-9IdtbbsnKnwaeDFsZnV6RVh4dZ0-pENoK_2gQRRNKZzb5wij2PtABn3q15u2yS9D) Right now, there are about 250 World War II veterans whose stories the AVC has identified to record. So, in order to professionally capture the Oral Histories of all 250 of the heroic veterans on their waiting list, it’s going to cost the AVC around $500,000. These memories and their history is priceless, and the time to capture them is urgent. [**That’s why I’m asking you to join me in supporting the AVC Oral History Project with a tax-deductible gift of $15, $35, $50 or more today. **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=827afd0188924d8d96ad2961f33b9b88&_e=ehSSKFLOsHPrzenEcCT-aMgFMHSnpJLcYUVSVNl4HULw2B1mmQmPyMtH9SA9bwSz_19xD-axfHkTDD8vXKruB7Kdh0fTXhblhkV-watwg0NZC4sSO08JEnb5wqdkZaswoEYobPyIyPPbzkOgqN8uszafhF5xLtIv1HFxSV52w_4Sm4NMF7Dax_W7o8iOC7G3ioAzPL3H-r-rx87r1RX5iKnDaazRGtwxOzmBGmsULev4CeVjme9nZZDcXmP0OSIDZL-5Wpen4-xCFqAZBtVDM5qNoaEbKtjH4iDq3eaIMk_lT8P4IQieuduEEH113OnTyKEcUq2BpILDZgP8XsGD_atSMcxjy5jWNzFVNsCnDHhn9IseM22tIhrdlV_kRhDrw5ZBlXw4rGrxbWPg1NgPLIMLJ6sg-Os4nGv0TqgYsFg2YDSXKXgzSlbelzrLvxLM) If you can give more – such as $75, $100, or even $500 – that would certainly be most welcome. But please know that any amount you can afford to give today will make a real difference in helping the AVC preserve the legacies of our military veterans. Thank you for taking the time to read my letter. And thank you in advance for your help in this time-sensitive mission. _ _ Warmest regards, Joe Mantegna Actor, Director, Producer, Writer [**SUPPORT THE AVC**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=827afd0188924d8d96ad2961f33b9b88&_e=ehSSKFLOsHPrzenEcCT-aMgFMHSnpJLcYUVSVNl4HULw2B1mmQmPyMtH9SA9bwSz_19xD-axfHkTDD8vXKruB7Kdh0fTXhblhkV-watwg0NZC4sSO08JEnb5wqdkZaswoEYobPyIyPPbzkOgqN8uszafhF5xLtIv1HFxSV52w_4Sm4NMF7Dax_W7o8iOC7G3ioAzPL3H-r-rx87r1RX5iKnDaazRGtwxOzmBGmsULetpgIDUllwc4qhsTvp_wwKV5QTgstzv98RzgtelX4n2hzlNzR9YpXExahhjslKzeRH9NNntqslQn_BPivovaV4xjkeCgAuJEcWP3l3WucPUvYA7pmSBHZoFMKvZS1cIE2q1IdTElK1PM9DPU9QKycz1mR86RiR79M-Jz1RSV-v58uEU_pfzsHpkWP1B4i5-FUgcdR407akwmxPcZzDiFGYF) [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=827afd0188924d8d96ad2961f33b9b88&_e=ehSSKFLOsHPrzenEcCT-aMgFMHSnpJLcYUVSVNl4HULw2B1mmQmPyMtH9SA9bwSz_19xD-axfHkTDD8vXKruB7Kdh0fTXhblhkV-watwg0NZC4sSO08JEnb5wqdkZaswoEYobPyIyPPbzkOgqN8uszafhF5xLtIv1HFxSV52w_4Sm4NMF7Dax_W7o8iOC7G3ioAzPL3H-r-rx87r1RX5iKnDaazRGtwxOzmBGmsULev8MS3inL1Pvn77E5azhv69yZz9o5NFVvqCGD4u6kogg6kI4CWi81-NtLeH3F_j_cEAH1hE9mp23qaUOFcjRnVl8nqu6TUL1lVDiRrUo1kRjSLPcSHw9OBgqpAyG2JzPbv2XWW_1-f07Ldhr8P-wgWCm9qI-ZsE92UG2s-TbT7ZtnwHIpZz-L-_wTpThLhE3mj_LkxH0iJ2eoCPAB2ZqUXe) The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. | | [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=827afd0188924d8d96ad2961f33b9b88&_e=ehSSKFLOsHPrzenEcCT-aIrEjhLOck8qHc4stQhegmp9ZHq9ulTVeZNcWlrXBxi1u0HFogLVJgeoOft5XOWu3LNbHDkPDrOj0eYpALR6N8jowvdhyiDUOGWJbTaJ0KEG2NO3chOcYezke6htCz-IQ3WHmLvfLdI_zJjkXclbOpu3grPspFWCsT9NuHmpq5lBfHz3eWbEl40M_14JyYXmgzVc705vw0qYlhB6OcGp2tQJnZHW7isRFceOA9j2_VjxkY1fcHGPZG_bhJvK_0-vhqru2aYsB3UY43xta9ZH2F8%3D) | [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=827afd0188924d8d96ad2961f33b9b88&_e=ehSSKFLOsHPrzenEcCT-aFcZ6Ea6fy63Lc_yp2mOTI5XKcDkwBPpsxV-2X2C4YMTvVcm-8dU4sGfbHuXx-JJMHDbdbazu6dCLNkz4omkAlpxdg9252SgtELXn-L5QYNd-h-Op3j8oLnXR-Je0YDBOBKDd61pfudhMjJcwaKXVjwd4yysATRXHAHHkKBHsmb_dbtX6pimlLc5DvsHtyJhEzuBxEKvipiJ2poybhmW2H_B4yiF9jXX_pdBHA-C_jCtUQH433HjczogiMGWhQYTTQ%3D%3D) | [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=827afd0188924d8d96ad2961f33b9b88&_e=ehSSKFLOsHPrzenEcCT-aM4fjKzioseQQmA5XU1_K3-wkVBygeitmEenkg7tu-dqgO5GJdxw9Ih_FTkwMQMWtPcdCokh0VMSYFsBnbcwTxIJkngGTAJaxckTnmBGzolz-oSGHi_hhbEk0rXCHomZuN82224vRQ3FUyX1HKl9uLSrp9SDTcz9dD7iTRLR0XphvVEqC3HqKwUm1uZOtb-hCh_StBb1_7Ya3cNyCzzfELi5lh9Ub6_IT3nqPoxdERabB4ngoZ2UjYY8UajAPITSwhX1qDPHVyIGDHoyhVSnydk%3D)

body:
The Left wants us to play by the rules while they get to do whatever they want. The hypocrisy is out of control! | |

clean_body: Over the past year, crime has surged across the United States. Although major cities are being hit the hardest, blood is spilling all over the country Peter, Over the past year, crime has surged across the United States. Although major cities are being hit the hardest, blood is spilling all over the country. Since the start of 2020, homicides rose by 30% and have already risen 24% during the first half of this year. To put these numbers in perspective, 2020 saw the largest singular year increase in homicides, and 2021 is on pace to see a jump even higher. 54% of all voters--Republicans AND Democrats--agree that violent crime has become a major crisis in the United States, while 37% of voters agree it is a major problem, but not a crisis. However, with this in mind, major Democrats in Congress still bad-mouth the police and call for their widespread termination. Are their opinions even rooted in reality? Peter, this has to be stopped. We need to do everything we can to push back against Far-Left Susan Wild and all of her radical cronies who are playing political theater, not working on behalf of their millions of constituents. Recently, Rashida Talib stated, “No more policing, incarceration, and militarization. It can't be reformed.” Unfortunately, this is now a widespread opinion throughout the Democratic party. Leftists across the country including my former opponent Susan Wild are either staying silent on the issue or flat out supporting criminals. From releasing violent murders during the pandemic, to fundraising bail for rioters, and even outright saying the police need to go, the left has made their stance on the issue very clear. Peter, CHIP IN TODAY so we can reinstitute the values and policy our country needs. You are not just helping me, but helping the country as a whole. Thank you, Lisa Scheller Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc.

Last week, Governor Kim Reynolds blamed unvaccinated immigrants entering the U.S. for Iowa’s rising rates of COVID. Team, Last week, Governor Kim Reynolds blamed unvaccinated immigrants entering the U.S. for Iowa’s rising rates of COVID. This kind of cruelty and fear-mongering has regrettably become the norm for GOP leadership in Iowa. The truth is, Governor Reynolds has expressed zero concern for over a year for the unmasked, unvaccinated Republican legislators putting Iowans at risk. And she has stripped local governments from their freedom to implement COVID safety measures that work for their own communities. We can read between the lines. Governor Reynolds dehumanizes people and disrespects local elected leaders for political gain. **That’s not the Iowa I know.** The Iowa I know has historically welcomed refugee and immigrant children who needed a home. It has been a place where people come together -- no matter what political party -- in times of great challenge, like COVID. We have too much work to do to allow this divisive narrative and these political power plays to get in the way of progress. **[We’re building a movement that will bring people together — not pit them against each other. Join me in opposing Gov. Reynolds' callous attacks on immigrants today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33476167/298999090/461694885?refcode=fl_email_pt_20210803reynolds_rs_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTFkZjRlNy1iNWY0LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kur56FOCyWO6JfSP3P8qtlLWpk7tYcPKUKn-tbgUgt8=&emci=43077e9b-9af4-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=d11df4e7-b5f4-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=21044445)** **** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33476168/298999091/461694885?refcode=fl_email_pt_20210803reynolds_rs_full_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTFkZjRlNy1iNWY0LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kur56FOCyWO6JfSP3P8qtlLWpk7tYcPKUKn-tbgUgt8=&emci=43077e9b-9af4-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=d11df4e7-b5f4-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=21044445)

name: Team Lee
subject: A win for Yucca Mountain ⛰️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33476367/299000328/-1528880522?refcode=SL_headerlogoAB&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzJkMGZmMC1iNmY0LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=udfXAMfZUYXEYYOx5Bjrjkp7ynbVLvo_V0cAc1zUOFs=)

| | Team -- we have some great news to report! Thanks to Susie’s leadership and hard work, funding for the proposed nuclear repository at Yucca Mountain has been blocked. That’s another important step toward keeping nuclear waste out of Nevada. This is a **major win for Nevadans.** Susie worked with other Nevadan officials to ensure our state has _clean, usable, and safe public lands_ by ensuring no nuclear waste is being dumped at Yucca Mountain. But we still need your support. Even though Susie has continued to block funding for Yucca Mountain, we need 150 people from 18326 to sign on in support of protecting this precious resource. name: Are you still on our side? (via NRSC)
subject: We failed.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Our End-of-Month deadline has passed, and we FAILED to meet our fundraising goal. | Peter,

**Our End-of-Month deadline has passed, and _we FAILED_ to meet our fundraising goal.**

Without your support, the Democrats are one step closer to keeping their majority for another 2 years and completely **_ERASING_ President Trump's legacy. **

We cannot allow this, Peter, the future of our nation is at stake.

| | Peter, the GOP is killing bills left and right, hoping Democrats won't be able to keep up. But Raphael Warnock is refusing to play their game by fighting for both the infrastructure package AND his new bipartisan voting rights bill. After the GOP blocked the For the People Act and as infrastructure talks are ramping up, Warnock is committed to multitasking, saying: **“We'll be working on infrastructure, and we'll be working on the infrastructure of our democracy.”** | **[HELP SENATOR WARNOCK PASS BOTH](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33477244/299011506/-29553365?refcode=OUT_20210802_GEN_FDR_H&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg4OTY1MDE4LWJiZjQtZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=cDbjxvziWZn7VjIf5EWh7rbOmS1NbOCz9krEGGW6pas=)**

clean_body: This is it. Today’s our Special Election Primary for Ohio’s 15th Congressional District. And the last minute dash by our RINO and neverTrump opponents | Peter This is it. Today’s our Special Election Primary for Ohio’s 15th Congressional District. And the last minute dash by our RINO and neverTrump opponents to deceive the voters is unprecedented. Millions of dollars in Op-Eds, dishonest radio and TV ads, deceptive phone calls and text messages have all been aimed at eliminating the only Trump-endorsed Candidate in this race. All of this is being coordinated by unhinged out-of-state megadonors who want to see President Trump lose. They’re seeing the same polling we’re seeing and they’re hoping this last-minute surge in spending will suppress our voters and cut into our lead in the polls. It’s a long shot, but if we don’t respond it could work. | No lead is safe! If pro-Trump voter turnout dips just a few percentage points, this race could go either way. The good news is that we have the winning message with the voters, we just need to make sure every single one of them turns out to vote. This is the LAST election before the 2022 midterms to show the Liberal Media and elites that Donald Trump is still the leader of our Party. Thank you, Mike Carey The only Trump endorsed candidate Ohio's 15th Congressional District | | Paid for by Carey for Congress P.O. Fellow patriot,

As a conservative, I know you’ll appreciate this. **History suggests that Republicans will take back the majority in the House in the 2022 midterm election** but we have one problem; the Left has never controlled the media quite like they do today.

To pull this off, we’ll need a team effort from conservatives everywhere, including you Fellow patriot. That’s why I need you to know about my fellow Texan, a conservative running for Congress, Monica De La Cruz Hernandez. **[If there’s ever been a candidate that deserves your support in this election, it’s Monica](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=6bb001ff75cd4368b2ccdf28a659f233&_e=EFD8zYDGnQ1RO9UlH9xkDkrFXDRs360KKcwAtWYsbiTgdaAp-D1lu0IocITxQRyk4nD8rSsmcYSF_f0_8xsJalyCL8dvcOtgQ1XbdQn3TRqtnzseCaWa8eAk8Ch_PMFaE3w3jNdquA1Seb_ET9pCpYbm3l2pG0IEeYy2eaY2G6_F0VyhhiC7RA8fK7eUyTMqDThJ4kOhg2h_T1RhzflkIyBcVdy75QLYElIH7m0omM0gqwk3PESqnOrQpiJHh40U6maiqUP_dscI-ZcUtB99JW6TDJUFPmz9wbKI3My8MF6vZrBaW8Tv2c1U1TOg_q93iNBCwJ3uXhU9oATLTURDLd5WhkDxyMhQvTyr3jbrd8fp45oVnAiuCh07Guncgqvo8uy7cYeItX08ZZUHoVesBR7rv2q5gWOkBG3wof1yNb_4vHuvVJUnkgERMAEKU6DhpSi71yH4QOMae-SXwFVP8MjwQUkzGXHR6AK-4GIriAbO4dhggCTT9C5CnJrikaW9brkOt_66rBlNQ31SvhJRKhpbeCU2UX2p0JlFqcQ24yA%3D)**.

In the 2020 election, Monica narrowly fell short of winning a congressional seat in South Texas, narrowly missing out on becoming the _first ever conservative Latina woman elected to Congress from her district_! When I say she narrowly lost, I mean it.**Monica fell short by just 6,588 votes – out of more than 228,000 votes cast -- and I think she’s got a real shot at winning this time around!**

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=6bb001ff75cd4368b2ccdf28a659f233&_e=EFD8zYDGnQ1RO9UlH9xkDkrFXDRs360KKcwAtWYsbiTgdaAp-D1lu0IocITxQRyk4nD8rSsmcYSF_f0_8xsJalyCL8dvcOtgQ1XbdQn3TRqtnzseCaWa8eAk8Ch_PMFaE3w3jNdquA1Seb_ET9pCpYbm3l2pG0IEeYy2eaY2G6_F0VyhhiC7RA8fK7eUyTMqDThJ4kOhg2h_T1RhzflkIyBcVdy75QLYElIH7m0omM0gqwk3PESqnOrQpiJHh40U6maiqUP_dscI-ZcUtB99JW6TDJUFPmz9wbKI3My8MF6vZrBaW8Tv2c1U1TOg_q93iNBCwJ3uXhU9oATLTURDLQWXv4K13OSBdjpRbVCr7L-i54p72IBv8IAa6TJf4Tlok_Wj-cyFmOCoFudqABKx2Ge6WgnVgrqllEkOUG-8ZlXpGqFvG_bPxRqJbdhy_dvqZqrFqY2TdzHJw-T-yVQk84gs3WhyqPTcVHsXOnP5TK6QgKMhkVbTThoXFU-XMSQ-01_A-lAUPqmN3MEvUWgW3l7W-0K_soQw6UZ99I5fnvI%3D)

**With the Democrats completely ignoring our border communities right now, Monica should be able to overcome the 6,000-vote deficit and if she does, she’ll play an instrumental role in the Republican Party re-establishing a House majority. And quite frankly, I’d be hard-pressed to think of a better spokesperson for border reform than someone who grew up on the border, still lives near the border, and knows the people most affected by DEMS lack of interest in border security.**

clean_body: Monica nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for you to help my friend make it to the top of the hill this time around | Fellow patriot, As a conservative, I know you’ll appreciate this. History suggests that Republicans will take back the majority in the House in the 2022 midterm election but we have one problem; the Left has never controlled the media quite like they do today. To pull this off, we’ll need a team effort from conservatives everywhere, including you Fellow patriot. That’s why I need you to know about my fellow Texan, a conservative running for Congress, Monica De La Cruz Hernandez. . In the 2020 election, Monica narrowly fell short of winning a congressional seat in South Texas, narrowly missing out on becoming the first ever conservative Latina woman elected to Congress from her district! When I say she narrowly lost, I mean it.Monica fell short by just 6,588 votes – out of more than 228,000 votes cast -- and I think she’s got a real shot at winning this time around! With the Democrats completely ignoring our border communities right now, Monica should be able to overcome the 6,000-vote deficit and if she does, she’ll play an instrumental role in the Republican Party re-establishing a House majority. And quite frankly, I’d be hard-pressed to think of a better spokesperson for border reform than someone who grew up on the border, still lives near the border, and knows the people most affected by DEMS lack of interest in border security. But none of this can happen without . | Like me, Monica is a strong proponent of equal opportunity but, equal outcomes on the other hand don’t come without hard work. name: Josh Hawley
subject: We need more cops
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
I won’t sit by and watch America’s law enforcement community be disrespected and demonized by the left [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=2479e06a21d84528bf220b34996c1d6c&_e=MeAZqwQTmUnQ7WmLWHp-5WJ9Wh_YzhlpFme16YqvZisPDv4fc-As7pYn9D43pvrEpQ4vKbIghxfzHxkjLIxQ-vf2eK8tp92FFW85Qyh0sTviD83XkMREGWCrQ7US6lpeZy_rmVIv2zuLrNeD2dkWpyueNuy7VF2SuU-g21nPMBbMHQ2rCObvBlZA8bsyfNV82fdbLMQSMNdwu0FxVnywd7xP86_0qrnmSH4NBYnywB3nYPy1J-Wixr_qb_UrEeZSDLJPEJuEaI6bToR7C_7EEXj9wNVVfc16ciHTiNL3gWbyB6-HhopVE8eM5xXkGZTew075GHrxFU8ZGKNRRTO9KIi9AFkCrk2uwBZL1xgK7A3xMFxxtRU7OR3T_kyJ1Pc2KAE-hWOwQcJb0ki1-GQapgyImK-eW663ZkYqbl4w0i8%3D) | |
---
Peter,
Each week we read tragic stories about violence rising in cities and communities across the nation.

For the last year, Democrats beat the drum of “defund the police.”

Their anti-police message has taken hold and emboldened criminals, and made life more dangerous for law-abiding citizens.

**It's absolutely vital that we keep American families safe. That is the bottom line, and right now, too many Americans aren’t.****
**

I won’t sit by and watch America’s law enforcement community be disrespected and demonized by the left — I’m taking **ACTION**.

In the Senate, I introduced legislation that would hire 100,000 new police officers.

**It’s not complicated — we need more cops. We shouldn't be defunding the police, we should be supporting them.**
[**JOIN THE FIGHT >>>**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=2479e06a21d84528bf220b34996c1d6c&_e=MeAZqwQTmUnQ7WmLWHp-5WJ9Wh_YzhlpFme16YqvZisPDv4fc-As7pYn9D43pvrEpQ4vKbIghxfzHxkjLIxQ-vf2eK8tp92FFW85Qyh0sTviD83XkMREGWCrQ7US6lpeZy_rmVIv2zuLrNeD2dkWpyueNuy7VF2SuU-g21nPMBbMHQ2rCObvBlZA8bsyfNV882a3OhYasH4hthSSxUDR5yT-Id2dEW1O_vgX0p7wbgzxogG6_WQQBgzjAryarYyjfn4yjoXtusHR0-5n9jbuzfZZjSNi0O5Agf8wmvnqF61OmEFcfFQzmQXbitdSsxQ29EXGswh8Cy_mUHFICHzNvH5A9lsmVAySExHn0X5AIGm1YWd7b26cY739EmM_vxyThXLu33mRwEJ3bi75pzn-PibpL-SlChixV37g7GmUTkg%3D)

In Liberty,

Josh Hawley

|

[**I don 't have a second to waste. Mitch McConnell and his Senate Republicans just raised a WHOPPING $28 MILLION to defeat our Democrats and buy their way back into power. Can you rush $3 before midnight to STOP a Republican takeover and PROTECT our House Majority? I'm calling for 1,OOO gifts to close the gap and defend our House Democrats >>**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/D_)

**FIRST:** McConnell FUMED when our Democrats flipped his precious Senate Majority.

**THEN:** He admitted he would do ANYTHING to oppose President Biden and sabotage our progress.

**NOW:** McConnell and his Republicans just raised $28 MILLION to defeat our Senate Democrats and barge back into power.

The last time McConnell's Republicans held the Majority...

...they voted to **REPEAL** our health care, **DESTROY** Social Security, and appointed right-wing judges for **LIFE**.

clean_body: | | | My name is Marcus Flowers and I am an Army veteran running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and restore civility and common sense to our political discourse. As someone who spent a decade of my life serving in war zones, I’m sick of seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene and the other leaders of the alt-right hijack the phrase "patriotism" to serve their own vile beliefs. I know patriotism -- and the reality is they’re the farthest thing from it. Through my work serving overseas on four continents, I’ve seen firsthand the damage done by radicalism, extremism, disinformation, lawlessness, and propaganda -- and after seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene bring her conspiracy theories and hatred to my home district? I knew I had to get in the race. Now, let’s not kid ourselves: the battle to unseat Greene and other Trump-Republicans like Glenn Youngkin will be difficult. She is the new darling of the Radical Right media machine -- and she’s backed by millions in special-interest money. But one thing I’ve learned throughout my career in service is that when the mission is this important, you have to stay focused. Together we can accomplish great things, Marcus Flowers | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . subject: Gas Prices 📈
body:
#BidenEconomy. | |
---
| | [ ](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=aeb210fab7&e=ae0ea222da)
---
| Friend,

As a mother and business owner, I understand how difficult it is when gas prices rise. Seven years ago when gas prices were above $3, I felt the pain and I know other families are feeling the same now.
_This same time last year, it cost me under $20 to fill my car’s tank, now I’m looking at close to $40! _
With an already struggling economy due to small businesses being forced to close their doors, skyrocketing inflation, and bad business policies by progressives, those of us in the middle class can’t take it anymore.

I want to hear it directly from you; how much are you paying for gas?
---
**[VIRGINIA REPUBLICAN SURVEY](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=1b75939499&e=ae0ea222da)** [**HOW MUCH ARE YOU PAYING FOR A GALLON OF GAS?**

**1) $1-$2
2) $2-$3
3) $3-$4
4) Over $4 **

](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=005588c4a1&e=ae0ea222da)[SUBMIT MY RESPONSE ](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=9eb9172fcd&e=ae0ea222da)

---
| Don’t let Biden’s economy hurt you and your family anymore!

Thank you,

[](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=656bcad146&e=ae0ea222da)
Tina Ramirez
Republican Front Runner
VA’s 7 Congressional District
_Defending American Values_
